name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: re: GOP gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

In April, the results of the 2020 census came out, showing that since
Texas gained the most residents of any state in the past decade, it would
gain two new congressional seats.

Here's where things stand now:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47065?refcode=ema20211012-157909&t=1001&akid=157909%2E444211%2E8yo4ed ]The New York Times Headline
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47065?refcode=ema20211012-157909&t=1002&akid=157909%2E444211%2E8yo4ed ]The Texas Tribune Headline

Texas Republicans are taking every measure imaginable to unfairly shore up
their power and weaken the votes of young, diverse, and Democratic-leaning
Texans. Unfortunately, this isn't a surprise –
the Texas GOP has been becoming more extreme for years. That's why Powered
by People has been doing the work to counteract their attacks on
democracy.

Our Texas volunteers are registering thousands of new voters in their
communities — and on the national level, we're calling on the federal
government to pass the For the People Act to protect our voting rights and
ban gerrymandering.

If we're going to fight back against the GOP's racist gerrymandering and
protect the right to vote, we need all hands on deck. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47065?refcode=ema20211012-157909&t=1003&akid=157909%2E444211%2E8yo4ed ]Please, chip in
now to support our work to register hundreds of thousands of new voters,
elect Democrats, and protect our democracy.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47065?refcode=ema20211012-157909&amount=3&t=1022&akid=157909%2E444211%2E8yo4ed ]Contribute $3

Over the last decade, Texas has gained nearly two million Hispanic
residents and more than 500,000 Black residents – but even with the
addition of two new congressional districts, the new GOP-drawn Texas
congressional map will not have a single majority-Latino or majority-Black
congressional district.

In addition, the GOP doubled the number of safe Republican districts and
cut the number of competitive districts from 12 to one. And the same
pattern is playing out in state legislative districts where Republicans
are desperately trying to stay in power after passing an extreme voter
suppression law and six-week abortion ban.

Thanks to the constant organizing work of Powered by People volunteers,
the past two elections have brought Texas closer to flipping blue than
ever before. Now, we need to fight back against the GOP's latest voter
suppression schemes and flip Texas blue once and for all.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47065?refcode=ema20211012-157909&t=1023&akid=157909%2E444211%2E8yo4ed ]Powered by People is doing the work right
now to elect Democrats in 2022 and beyond. Will you donate
$3 or more so we can continue our door knocks, phone banks,
and voter registration events across Texas?

Thank you for being a part of this,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47065?refcode=ema20211012-157909&t=1024&akid=157909%2E444211%2E8yo4ed ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=157909%2E444211%2E8yo4ed

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Newsweek reported a poll showing former President Trump is the 2024 Presidential election. | | | We appreciate your prompt response! \-- Team Ruiz [1] Newsweek: Donald Trump Beats Joe Biden in 2024 Election Poll | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. body:
Enhances Efforts to Grow Future of the Republican Party | | | |
---
| | |
#### **The Republican State Leadership Committee Launches “Right Leaders Network” to Enhance Efforts to Grow the Future of the Republican Party**
---
|
---
| The Republican State Leadership Committee announced today the launch of the **Right Leaders Network** , a redoubling of its long-standing efforts to do its part to grow the Republican Party with more women and minority candidates and elected officials. Through the RSLC’s Right Women Right Now and Future Majority Project initiatives, the committee over the past decade has recruited, trained, supported, and elected thousands of diverse state Republicans across the country, many of whom went on to serve in statewide and federal offices.

“The Republican State Leadership Committee has long served as the tip of the spear for the continued efforts to grow the Republican Party at the state level,” **said RSLC President Dee Duncan.** “While our programs have been extraordinarily successful, we know that much work––and many challenges––remain ahead of us. We are incredibly proud of the collection of trailblazers who have agreed to participate in the Right Leaders Network and I know they will be critical in our continued mission to elect candidates all across the country that better represent the communities they serve.”

The Right Leaders Network will be led by chairpersons representing each of the RSLC’s four caucuses (RLCC, RLGA, RSSC, Ag America) and an advisory council comprised of former state leaders who later served, or are currently serving in higher office. These advisory council members will help the RSLC continue to highlight how building the party must start in the states, as 21 of 50 current Republican U.S. Senators served in state office, 104 Republican U.S. House members served in state offices, and 10 out of 27 Republican governors previously served as lieutenant governors. **Advisory Council**
Tennessee Senator Marsha Blackburn
Florida Senator Marco Rubio
South Carolina Senator Tim Scott
Iowa Congresswoman Ashley Hinson
California Congresswoman Young Kim
Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
Former U.N. Ambassador and South Carolina Governor Nikki Haley **Chairs**
New Hampshire state Representative Joe Alexander
Ohio state Senator Niraj Antani
New Mexico state Representative Kelly Fajardo
Hawaii state Representative Val Okimoto
Florida Lieutenant Governor Jeanette Nuñez
North Carolina Lieutenant Governor Mark Robinson
Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose
West Virginia Commissioner of Agriculture Kent Leonhardt
---

body:
I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=722863aebe4141d08a6727be24a20f16&_e=fByd04t9AHi09tS6VWySdZo4hNVUXzc7WzS4J8teF3_BwyNzFpLseVWO3I4G79TIFaK4Av7uFEVhEryLtdCGaKzF1OH0NiGxLFMcfL5hNORjAEj3otX7uLtYd77qLb3yKziMes9NfxT5d2D9VvN_CiXYU-mUe3aGhflqHe9kacFY-xFKDymJ0KWwDBAEaWbR4xmoSsSBavAKOIpyy-k-IrohQQjr4czuwc4c54Sc8aWEbOn4TlMcGiCv-e9kY5w48cNBluIeQ6QvBk8MxiwGvKhem6-SSm0fvV6WQyaKoUs0MN3GxprIcOvMA7Gx5r8wQRp8JZGOz91e9aeRYC7Eu8hB9Ad7RmR2IKXdcgkdkeZhiVLRXozApGFFIjl-xoxDTGYIWO_72EY6-51GCuKL2N8iBX1gc_xzYi-3EZWqQBK4y2BVUM_7lNW0aQGoDPFngIRPhdtPOOJTVA5VNfAw4w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=722863aebe4141d08a6727be24a20f16&_e=fByd04t9AHi09tS6VWySdZo4hNVUXzc7WzS4J8teF3_BwyNzFpLseVWO3I4G79TIFaK4Av7uFEVhEryLtdCGaKzF1OH0NiGxLFMcfL5hNORjAEj3otX7uLtYd77qLb3yKziMes9NfxT5d2D9VvN_CiXYU-mUe3aGhflqHe9kacFY-xFKDymJ0KWwDBAEaWbR4xmoSsSBavAKOIpyy-k-IrohQQjr4czuwc4c54Sc8aWEbOn4TlMcGiCv-e9kY5w4RJfAh_OYCrwvESVt9YWEwLLs8kZ5T5HcGTcc5DVk3oMFArLpXVc8XwUpX6612uJ5VOZW5aHG-y_ahqpASN3XzLrGZyOOq6V-84f_ZG1dz_l1ozN1iqEPma1W1a9DR7vRg-IYh2CQ_Epu9od4IoqZCPzHMPzGD7EGLAfFKK7268-ytb6ZuZDY8zjmS_IpdG9jkCVOuV1PHRY0kMDnknAPBQ%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

**[If you think that America needs lawmakers in Washington who continue to see the best America has to offer- rather than the worst, would you make a sacrifice on my behalf today by sending us $5, $10, $34 or more so we can build a campaign machine capable of going up against whatever Democrats are going to throw our way?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=722863aebe4141d08a6727be24a20f16&_e=fByd04t9AHi09tS6VWySdZo4hNVUXzc7WzS4J8teF3_BwyNzFpLseVWO3I4G79TIFaK4Av7uFEVhEryLtdCGaKzF1OH0NiGxLFMcfL5hNORjAEj3otX7uLtYd77qLb3yKziMes9NfxT5d2D9VvN_CiXYU-mUe3aGhflqHe9kacFY-xFKDymJ0KWwDBAEaWbR4xmoSsSBavAKOIpyy-k-IrohQQjr4czuwc4c54Sc8aWEbOn4TlMcGiCv-e9kY5w4QxRecN01u5kWnENqaYdVEBv4XaWWHwYChhIpCLREzYTUKmJZFhQwwI_oi4JPyXueffKPxasXfL_jXYeFgGyYeziGLvo6wBbxEUo_4iFpU3Rezz-_EKpdP0RBC6-WNwozY3iOD4ZHYTU_JYimVUmMxQ9sjTth6nKTlhvOL-vyaR3c9tW7PyJ-SbTPKzZNIcaGTbb2d3k90DMvpwjSu_VMxA%3D%3D)**

[**Send $5, $10, $34 or more our way today ->**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=722863aebe4141d08a6727be24a20f16&_e=fByd04t9AHi09tS6VWySdZo4hNVUXzc7WzS4J8teF3_BwyNzFpLseVWO3I4G79TIFaK4Av7uFEVhEryLtdCGaKzF1OH0NiGxLFMcfL5hNORjAEj3otX7uLtYd77qLb3yKziMes9NfxT5d2D9VvN_CiXYU-mUe3aGhflqHe9kacFY-xFKDymJ0KWwDBAEaWbR4xmoSsSBavAKOIpyy-k-IrohQQjr4czuwc4c54Sc8aWEbOn4TlMcGiCv-e9kY5w4nDnSPY0PTrJDflOSe8mTpakIp7yremLpe17p-4rJ13t59butvbVI31vWmhuzq4wNFGHR4REMB6saa7naeY6FZtynkMCTiy_e1s-GXAxqf_eJVgS9s6kpb4bw8p4rwHL1qQftrPVvqnhEwnqPNvul-CP5SF_1EAWwOZSkR9esj7FZDxU2Jetm3MpKhliedcd1t_--UeyWmgELLUmZ1XkBiA%3D%3D)
I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important.

Democrats know what's at stake.

Republicans know what's at stake.

I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now.

The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - _**and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg.**_

I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America.

I hope you'll join us on this journey.

Thanks,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=722863aebe4141d08a6727be24a20f16&_e=fByd04t9AHi09tS6VWySdZo4hNVUXzc7WzS4J8teF3_BwyNzFpLseVWO3I4G79TIFaK4Av7uFEVhEryLtdCGaKzF1OH0NiGxLFMcfL5hNORjAEj3otX7uLtYd77qLb3yKziMes9NfxT5d2D9VvN_CiXYU-mUe3aGhflqHe9kacFY-xFKDymJ0KWwDBAEaWbR4xmoSsSBavAKOIpyy-k-IrohQQjr4czuwc4c54Sc8aWEbOn4TlMcGiCv-e9kY5w4iWYbnd4sePgB0XSIOYx-qSyCN9BZ3PQlJe6kXYzBlzqn7CRoDIMBTmwQORL26KHQrw8v8k5aIie_jqZzGEUtbaKCYSN0vyLha3I3s0q2mf7D-KPTJtZL_sdZ9Ape0LGzpfNJLBauXOfLyGSbhFAQdt9UH4FnDsWSzBB0tO1RpyeYbFsa07DW3QldFv--EXmmP_tfnqmpOx15zcsQsTF31w%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for US Senate

clean_body: I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. | Fellow American, As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now. While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party. This race is about the future of America. Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs. When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path. That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself. I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important. Democrats know what's at stake. Republicans know what's at stake. I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg. I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America. I hope you'll join us on this journey. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Donald J. Trump October 12th, 2021
Not even possible to believe the lies, exaggerations, and outright fraud committed by very poorly rated Morning “News” Shows about the January 6th protest. They say whatever comes to their mind, like writing a fictional novel. The press has lost its way at a level that is not even believable. Books, likewise, are made up stories and should only be sold as fiction. These are terrible human beings that do this to our Country. The 2020 Election was a fraud rife with errors, irregularities, and scandal. The Radical Left knows it, the media knows it, and the Patriots of our Country know it, and now the U.S.A. is paying a big price—it is very sadly going to hell!

Donald J. Trump October 12th, 2021
At the request of Mayor Bloomberg, the former Mayor of New York City, I took a longtime scandal-ridden site in the Bronx, which for almost 30 years had been a money-losing disaster that the city could not get built, and transformed it into a magnificent Jack Nicklaus Signature designed golf course, club house and amenities, which employs a large number of people and has been a showcase of beauty and success. I invested many millions of dollars, all cash, in this project in order to get it done, which I did, starting from scratch, in record time. It was an amazing effort by many people pulling together to finally revitalize this troubled part of New York City. It was a large-scale version of the Wollman Skating Rink in Central Park, which I saved many years ago.

Now under Mayor De Blasio, he wants to CONFISCATE the project from me for no reason whatsoever, and terminate my long-term arrangement with the city—and to think I just opened a beautiful $10 million clubhouse. The course has received rave reviews, is considered one of the top ten open to the public facilities in the United States (could even be the best!), is designed for tournament play, and Mayor De Blasio wants to take it away after all of the work was so successfully done, and so much money was spent. So unfair—this is what happens in Communist Countries, not in America!

Donald J. Trump October 12th, 2021
Our Border has gone from the safest and most secure in history, by far, to a broken, dirty, and disgusting wreck with thousands of unknown people from unknown countries, including from their now emptied prisons all over the world, unsustainably pouring in. No country has ever seen anything like what is happening on the Southern Border of the United States—and no country is stupid enough to allow such a thing to happen. Crime will go up at levels that the U.S. has never seen before (it is actually already there), and terrorism will be the next big wave to lead the way.

Despite this, and incredibly, the very expensive and high-tech Border Wall, which has been 100% successful in areas where it was completed, is being lifted from installation points and moved to storage dumps where it will begin the process of rotting and rusting away. Putting it in place would have been far less expensive, and the Wall would have been quickly completed—there was very little left to do. Billions of dollars are being paid to contractors to NOT build the Wall, specifically, $6 million per day. The “leaders” of our Country have gone crazy! Everything is falling apart, our Military is in shambles, the shelves of our stores are empty, COVID continues to rage at levels higher than last year, we have no oil, we have no courage, we have nothing. Our Country is a laughingstock all over the world, and is certainly no longer great, but we will Make America Great Again!

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump October 12th, 2021 Not even possible to believe the lies, exaggerations, and outright fraud committed by very poorly rated Morning “News” Shows about the January 6th protest. They say whatever comes to their mind, like writing a fictional novel. The press has lost its way at a level that is not even believable. Books, likewise, are made up stories and should only be sold as fiction. These are terrible human beings that do this to our Country. The 2020 Election was a fraud rife with errors, irregularities, and scandal. The Radical Left knows it, the media knows it, and the Patriots of our Country know it, and now the U.S.A. is paying a big price—it is very sadly going to hell! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump October 12th, 2021 At the request of Mayor Bloomberg, the former Mayor of New York City, I took a longtime scandal-ridden site in the Bronx, which for almost 30 years had been a money-losing disaster that the city could not get built, and transformed it into a magnificent Jack Nicklaus Signature designed golf course, club house and amenities, which employs a large number of people and has been a showcase of beauty and success. I invested many millions of dollars, all cash, in this project in order to get it done, which I did, starting from scratch, in record time. It was an amazing effort by many people pulling together to finally revitalize this troubled part of New York City. It was a large-scale version of the Wollman Skating Rink in Central Park, which I saved many years ago. Now under Mayor De Blasio, he wants to CONFISCATE the project from me for no reason whatsoever, and terminate my long-term arrangement with the city—and to think I just opened a beautiful $10 million clubhouse. The course has received rave reviews, is considered one of the top ten open to the public facilities in the United States (could even be the best!), is designed for tournament play, and Mayor De Blasio wants to take it away after all of the work was so successfully done, and so much money was spent. So unfair—this is what happens in Communist Countries, not in America! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump October 12th, 2021 Our Border has gone from the safest and most secure in history, by far, to a broken, dirty, and disgusting wreck with thousands of unknown people from unknown countries, including from their now emptied prisons all over the world, unsustainably pouring in. No country has ever seen anything like what is happening on the Southern Border of the United States—and no country is stupid enough to allow such a thing to happen. Crime will go up at levels that the U.S. has never seen before (it is actually already there), and terrorism will be the next big wave to lead the way. Despite this, and incredibly, the very expensive and high-tech Border Wall, which has been 100% successful in areas where it was completed, is being lifted from installation points and moved to storage dumps where it will begin the process of rotting and rusting away. Putting it in place would have been far less expensive, and the Wall would have been quickly completed—there was very little left to do. Billions of dollars are being paid to contractors to NOT build the Wall, specifically, $6 million per day. The “leaders” of our Country have gone crazy! Everything is falling apart, our Military is in shambles, the shelves of our stores are empty, COVID continues to rage at levels higher than last year, we have no oil, we have no courage, we have nothing. Our Country is a laughingstock all over the world, and is certainly no longer great, but we will Make America Great Again! | ---|--- Donald J. name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: Burt Jones: Why I'm Running for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 13, 2021
BURT JONES PENS OP-ED DISCUSSING VISION, RESULTS AS GEORGIA'S NEXT LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR
JACKSON - Today, conservative candidate for Georgia Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones [penned an op-ed for GeorgiaPol](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHuPLQQtt8u1hhdtBIG0pSr_O70srwvCwWlyF7NQGMH4GXXKahtv7af6OqjB1V_qzFZzhzpG6nLRotnw4KiekZlbemEgUmeZoLGtAqr4zTKhRHP2bkPawXStWRtLQTftrUPC-tAhnYE4XKFpRVaUcd_izOKix-LvX9l0MgomR1d3Qi_juB4jhD6WzXhblxrgISmmO5QZkOfJwJSQL_WadgTem8s1ltanI5RVpCIyAxLgaJwZfY8Fh41gBnOEJL-EVyEvkUxCKBkFawqyRkZeyw==&c=h9HqCg9OgFDiUYn8VAMMQs4Qo2u5mOR8LdO9toB5LTUjwDToH4Urvw==&ch=VxaZEgDvMRHXnyo8V025_wvjk53M88QFPm4EbnPjhBzPPkZVoUcjjw==) discussing his vision for Georgia and the results he will deliver to create jobs, stand with law enforcement, defend election integrity, and improve our education system. Burt recently received President Trump's full [endorsement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHuPLQQtt8u1hhdtBIG0pSr_O70srwvCwWlyF7NQGMH4GXXKahtv7QSRhwgj3BgAZCyKe2dEGLDySjdBgiBgGjD4dTgjHpmngWczReYRbuXsUCRweDIScsiU7Zalh8FW5TNQxKzSGy9_hCkdzPjTLw_9dlTY5cowovIcIJHt8cPQuPT-RIN0xbcnLmiyuNpzsMbCallv1IMi9K1xq-cVo3YuWppllv2S2krhR-OU-PQvY0IUGN6VdfqzatO5IGPSfccEg-TGtpwp8Mh-oGfEkQ==&c=h9HqCg9OgFDiUYn8VAMMQs4Qo2u5mOR8LdO9toB5LTUjwDToH4Urvw==&ch=VxaZEgDvMRHXnyo8V025_wvjk53M88QFPm4EbnPjhBzPPkZVoUcjjw==) in his race for Lieutenant Governor. Read the full text of the op-ed below:
---
|
---
| [Vision and Results: Why I'm running for Lieutenant Governor](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IHuPLQQtt8u1hhdtBIG0pSr_O70srwvCwWlyF7NQGMH4GXXKahtv7af6OqjB1V_qzFZzhzpG6nLRotnw4KiekZlbemEgUmeZoLGtAqr4zTKhRHP2bkPawXStWRtLQTftrUPC-tAhnYE4XKFpRVaUcd_izOKix-LvX9l0MgomR1d3Qi_juB4jhD6WzXhblxrgISmmO5QZkOfJwJSQL_WadgTem8s1ltanI5RVpCIyAxLgaJwZfY8Fh41gBnOEJL-EVyEvkUxCKBkFawqyRkZeyw==&c=h9HqCg9OgFDiUYn8VAMMQs4Qo2u5mOR8LdO9toB5LTUjwDToH4Urvw==&ch=VxaZEgDvMRHXnyo8V025_wvjk53M88QFPm4EbnPjhBzPPkZVoUcjjw==)
John Adams once said, "Always stand on principle - even if you stand alone." That sentiment has been the foundation for my calling to public service. Being true to who I am - and the people I am honored to serve - will always be my foundation and guiding principal. But unfortunately, for too many politicians in our country, those words ring hollow. They are more concerned about their own self-promotion, ambition, or political self-interests.
That contrast has been on vivid display in Georgia over the past few years. Too many politicians in our state have put their own interests ahead of those who elected them. Politicians who are more concerned with their next TV appearance or book deal and are willing to compromise their values at the drop of a hat to get ahead.
I'm running for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia to restore real, servant leadership to our state. As a proven business leader, consistent conservative, and uncompromising champion for Georgia values, I'm working to put the people of our state back in charge.
Like President Trump, I'm a business leader and political outsider. That's why back in 2016, I was the first elected official in Georgia to endorse him for President. I admired his experience as a businessman and outsider, his ability to bring new people into the conservative movement, and most of all, his promise to put America first again - and knew he was the right person at the right time for the job. Just last week, I was proud to receive the full endorsement from President Trump in our race.
Like President Trump, I've been underestimated and counted out - and I've always risen to the occasion. At the University of Georgia, I tried out for the football team. People said I was too small and too slow, but I worked hard, earned a scholarship, and became a four-year letterman elected permanent team captain for the 2002 SEC Championship season. As a businessman, I have helped establish and build many ventures employing hundreds of Georgians.
In 2012, I felt a calling to public service - so I ran for the State Senate to make a difference in my community. Since then, I have used my business experience as an outsider to advance my district's economic development by attracting new businesses and creating thousands of jobs and opportunities. I know how to get our economy moving, and I understand that, in order for hardworking Georgians to thrive, we have to cut red tape and lower taxes - starting with the state income tax.
I also stand very strongly behind our men and women in law enforcement. As Lieutenant Governor, I will increase funding for our local law enforcement officers, giving them the tools and resources needed to protect Georgia communities and crack down on the sex traffickers, gang members, and repeat offenders that put our families at risk. I will strengthen officers' retirement benefits so communities are able to grow and retain a stable public safety workforce. I will also work to stop illegal immigration by standing strong to finish the border wall and enforce a legal immigration system that rewards those who follow the rules.
Another major pillar of my plan for Georgia is continuing the fight for election integrity. S.B. 202 went a long way, but the work to restore confidence and security in our elections is far from over. I will call for a full, statewide investigation into the many documented irregularities in the 2020 elections in Georgia to get to the bottom of what happened. I will also ensure the Georgia Bureau of Investigation has the tools required to investigate and respond to future cases of potential voter fraud in real time.
Finally, our education system in Georgia is broken, and I want to fix it. I will work to build a world class K-12 and higher education system in Georgia by investing in teachers and students, prioritizing school choice, increasing access to vocational and technical education, and lowering the cost of post-secondary degrees. Furthermore, Critical Race Theory is a hateful and divisive ideology that has no place in our schools, and I will work to ban its instruction in our children's classrooms. We must instead emphasize civics-based education centered around unity and an understanding of and respect for our nation's founding principles.
We have reached an inflection point in American history. With left-wing radicals tearing our country apart, everyday Georgians need - and deserve - someone who will stand up to the liberal mob and fight for a better future for all. I will always stand strong on my conservative principles, and I will never compromise our values or sell you out. For lower taxes, for more jobs, for better education, for safer communities, for more secure elections, and to advance President Trump's America First Agenda, I am running for Lieutenant Governor, and I hope you'll join me.
---
| ###
Media Contact: [press@burtjonesforga.com](mailto:press@burtjonesforga.com)

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh1f60dqub0jejs4tiuh8dvvv5rmfb8ivku0k2e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chh64p70chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5cve39600mqgqtaf128p2kg0c2map9944bgo06o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chh64p70chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjdedqmhgr9ku81kcgvlreln0npgs8jr6ufu4gv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chh64p70chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

This fact means that we’re lo | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Look Peter, these people aren't playing games. Last Friday at 4 AM the FBI raided the home of a top Proud Boys leader, “seizing his computer, phone, and other electronics” according to _The Philadelphia Inquirer_. Members of the Proud Boys have stockpiled over 1,000 rounds of ammunition and repeatedly threatened Raphael Warnock's life, writing “Dead men can't pass laws” online. But don't miss the crucial connection here: Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — just tapped Herschel Walker to oust Warnock. Now CBS News reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised an eye-popping $3.7 million. If Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, and hundreds of people have donated, but FAR too many Democrats still think we can afford to take it easy. They just don't see it: up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. YOU won Raphael Warnock's historic election, which gave Democrats a 50/50 Senate. Our families received crucial COVID-19 relief money because of you. Right now we're asking for your urgent support to fight back against the Proud Boys' efforts to intimidate and oust Raphael Warnock, to protect the Democrat Senate, and to defeat Trump's hand-picked candidate. **[Fight this with us, Peter: We can't keep playing defense. We NEED to raise $2,801 immediately to catch up with the GOP's seven-figure offensive. Failure wouldn't just mean losing Warnock's strong progressive voice in the Capitol— it would mean losing our Democratic Senate. Don't hand the Republicans the keys to the country. Don't let Donald Trump keep emboldening right-wing domestic terrorists. name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za2uv8o1p92pjoifdlop1njp31sn3pm4t7akv4f0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj60oj7cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5kcjgm7cbks6pnadb76gp6edthehj3cd72cho60tljc5jj1pdgmhgm3cb5eco6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb8phgmapm0ptimtj32s5ic8r749fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsf7b0suqamt9i4k9u0hnktgu5vkpgtsl2e4s5ho_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj60oj7cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1hkb4lf7angpdjv6dlq6a3ms3hl8hr1ba9jvjag_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj60oj7cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo33pds5dtfbsd64qsrmaehfjh6p9gedegknoono_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj60oj7cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: One year from now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
This election season is going to fly by.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37487823/311300311/-796730906?refcode=EM_FR_211013mm1_mm_lbr_actives_4_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDE4NWVmMy0yODJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-qeqOU5Tbd3L74BsLgNJ_JvKI8QO74gtk96FrTCdks=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37487824/311300313/-796730906?refcode=EM_FR_211013mm1_mm_lbr_actives_4_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDE4NWVmMy0yODJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-qeqOU5Tbd3L74BsLgNJ_JvKI8QO74gtk96FrTCdks=) Friend,

We’re closing in on an important date: one year until Election Day.

For months now, my campaign and I have been talking about how important it is to raise as much money as possible _early_.

Early donations mean we can build a successful campaign well in advance. Your investment today could go toward hiring organizers to reach voters where they are across Delaware, building our digital outreach to keep voters informed about what I’m working on in Washington, or even everyone’s favorite campaign swag: yard signs.

Friend, I'm writing to you today because Delegate Lashrecse Aird needs your help. Lashrecse is being challenged by a far-right candidate, and the GOP is pouring huge amounts of money into the race to flip her seat. **I am incredibly proud to support Lashrecse 's re-election campaign.** She has been a passionate advocate for the citizens of Petersburg and its surrounding communities, and she has been instrumental in the passage of many progressive policies including Breonna's Law, which banned no-knock warrants in our Commonwealth. But with Election Day less than **3 WEEKS AWAY** , Lashrecse's campaign needs your support to reach the finish line. [**Will you join me by contributing $15 so Lashrecse can continue the great work she 's doing in the House of Delegates?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/l8IOy8fs8beq2VzKlo9ZEdkReQm1Fnq-VzNI0n20XmE=/_ZHkLzXgFr5mtk-Mha4ZDrO-50zlAyXpSx7hUAF5_vA=) In order to secure our Blue Majority, we need to protect Lashrecse's seat, and she needs our help. name: Nikki Fried
subject: Last night in Vero Beach
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Last night, I spoke with the Democratic Club of Indian River County in Vero Beach. It was a wonderful opportunity to connect with over 100 activists, party leaders, and engaged Democrats about how we can win together next year.

As I was walking into the event, I saw a few dozen protesters decrying mask mandates and showing their support for Governor DeSantis. I wasn’t surprised.

Why? Because in 2020, Donald Trump won Indian River County by over 20%.

But here’s the thing, team. To win this race, we can’t just go where the Democrats live. We need to build a big tent of Democrats, rational Republicans, and independents who are fed up with failed leaders like Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump.

When I won in 2018, we spent plenty of time in the reddest parts of Florida and built a winning movement. We’re doing the same thing right now.

To continue growing—and continuing traveling to every corner of Florida--we need your help. If you’re ready to do something new, build a broad coalition, and elect the first Democratic governor in
Florida since 1999, click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1013indianriver]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

I know that the anti-mask protesters and DeSantis fanatics aren’t going anywhere. I’m not worried about them.

We’re running a campaign to reach the overwhelming majority of Floridians who believe in science, want leaders who put Floridians first, and are sick of politicians who play politics with our kids and our future.

I know we can do this. We’re building a historic movement because of supporters like you, and I can’t thank you enough.

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Should the Senate reform the filibuster? [Looking for your feedback, Peter]:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I know that working families need a government that works for them...
| | |
---
Peter – it's time to reform the filibuster.
Voters sent Democratic leadership to the House, Senate _and_ White House for a reason: They trust our party to lead the country. But Republicans are wielding the filibuster to obstruct progress – progress that would make a real difference to working families: an increase to the minimum wage, protections for workers' rights and unions, and legislation to put a stop to Republican-led efforts to suppress the vote. **All of it has been blocked or threatened by the filibuster.**
Republicans have every right to disagree with the details of legislation. But they aren't using the filibuster for the sake of debate or to benefit their constituents. They are using it to embolden a far-right agenda that's out of touch with voters.
**I know that working families need a government that works for them, but with the filibuster in place, the Senate cannot do its job effectively. That's why I'm counting on this grassroots team to speak out alongside me and demand filibuster reform. I need 5,000 responses, including yours, before our midnight deadline:**
| | **DO YOU SUPPORT FILIBUSTER REFORM?**

clean_body: I know that working families need a government that works for them... | | | Peter – it's time to reform the filibuster. Voters sent Democratic leadership to the House, Senate and White House for a reason: They trust our party to lead the country. But Republicans are wielding the filibuster to obstruct progress – progress that would make a real difference to working families: an increase to the minimum wage, protections for workers' rights and unions, and legislation to put a stop to Republican-led efforts to suppress the vote. All of it has been blocked or threatened by the filibuster. Republicans have every right to disagree with the details of legislation. But they aren't using the filibuster for the sake of debate or to benefit their constituents. They are using it to embolden a far-right agenda that's out of touch with voters. I know that working families need a government that works for them, but with the filibuster in place, the Senate cannot do its job effectively. That's why I'm counting on this grassroots team to speak out alongside me and demand filibuster reform. I need 5,000 responses, including yours, before our midnight deadline: | | DO YOU SUPPORT FILIBUSTER REFORM? | | | | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. **This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share it with anyone else. Thank you for being on this team. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqp8qe2tsf3lcbn8gm5lu8d4b8isr72sksoemup0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj6eoj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onje8q76clkc8qm2t5hmljj1c5l64r62thnm2r34t5ickp7adj4eprb4cj5mlh6eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d3662pb6p9nmap6cclgm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm7cprg46f1oqa034b3m6mv90aab295j54sp213g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj6eoj2cjh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ufs463pq0cgmtuot0plon25mk1dk7gksh6ckcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj6eoj2cjh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5b52u5v2c9rcpr8folcdb6fh51j648f11r9kkc0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj6eoj2cjh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbutgabdm0fjs60onqqup6t90nrduoc3ggbt6t40_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj6eoj2cjh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd532o1lc2m5474qkvgc0p4re6bhmdsgd7lp9f9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj6eoj2cjh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhupkr1vf46tlh8fo1a3lillp67qldjou8sa0b68_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chj6eoj2cjh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: George Buck Endorses Amanda!
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw some big news: Amanda’s former Republican opponent George Buck... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=71211a67c3&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, We wanted to make sure you saw some big news: Amanda’s former Republican opponent George Buck has officially endorsed her campaign! George is a Fire Fighter, a Veteran who served our country honorably and was our party's nominee for Congress in 2018. George garnered the support of nearly one-third of Pinellas County Republican voters in the 2020 primary and is now firmly behind Amanda. _Here’s what George had to say about the race:_ “I am endorsing Amanda Makki today because she is the only true conservative in this race. Amanda’s opponent is a phony who couldn’t care less about the people in Pinellas County. She only came here to run for Congress and she failed miserably. **Voters in Florida’s 13th District won’t fall for a wolf in sheep’s clothing twice**. She’s an avid Obama supporter who wants to get famous on the backs of our hard-working community. If that’s not enough, she disgraced our country with her act of stolen valor. Amanda has worked tirelessly to help conservatives like President Trump get elected. _She’s the only candidate in this race who volunteered as an election attorney for President Trump and took on the Democrat election mob bosses in Wisconsin following the 2020 presidential elections.”_**\- George Buck** George was a worthy opponent, a life-long Pinellas County resident, and he knows we need to restore this seat to the days of Bill Young when Veterans were a priority. But it’s going to take all of us pulling together to get that done.
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=919c1b1f02&e=c2296cffff)
---
| **[SUPPORT AMANDA MAKKI FOR CONGRESS](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=59cc6dd6e9&e=c2296cffff)**
Please stand with George and Amanda and **[click here](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=963efe3ca4&e=c2296cffff)** to chip in to help Amanda continue to build momentum in this critical race!

Together we are going to flip our district and take back the House for the Republican Party. All of us here at Team Makki thank you deeply for your support.

**Thank you for your continued support** ,

_Team Makki_
---
| _Amanda Makki for Congress_**|[Visit our website](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=0417c54cad&e=c2296cffff)**

name: Pennsylvania Senate Alert
subject: Bad News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37500473/311341597/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTAyZGRkZC0zZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GUWUzjGphDyii07fc29avbI-kEQ62-Z8cNaO2JdpPyc=)
Friends — we just got some bad news out of Pennsylvania. Do you have a minute? **GOP Senate candidate Carla Sands just threw in $3 MILLION of her own money into her campaign fund.** _And if you thought that was bad, she’s already using $1 million of it on an ad buy in the state._ This is the first public sign of how much she and other GOP candidates are willing to use their personal wealth to flip these extremely close seats and upend our fragile Senate majority. So we really need to buckle down and hit our $100,000 grassroots fundraising goal by Friday. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies could find the opening they need. [_**So here’s the plan: Can you send a contribution of $10 or more to help us raise $100,000 from grassroots Democrats by Friday? name: Pro Life Update
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zml5ihl4molpqg1pih7tkmor0snr99tf6njeflfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chgm4o73clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6mj2nvd4hi5efe0lm7u8vqfdnqik34mr78qh25g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chgm4o73clh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zter1uiuv5tlg484413t9ksfi4dsssegbu9h99b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chgm4o73clh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

| | Derek, it’s official: All across the Commonwealth, Virginians are casting their ballots, and Derek, I’m fired up. But here’s the thing: I urgently need your help right now — and here’s why: **Recently, we learned that Glenn Youngkin outraised us because he wrote himself huge checks to the tune of 4 million dollars. name: Team Smiley
subject: There is a humanitarian crisis at the border.
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VOvyRLoAioI8DwhInPY7M3kYYnlQx43FD4QL5Ss3iQDPxuVm_xRnmc3UYhWdDw6y9tBH8zJBZ4BHPSoUJPu-zxF_6XI5v4DSqpoBdQHleQdgB-DQLEPER-V9nIPkHEqyxNqeIlEBwwW455A8GvwsIPVgVZdQwT76zaHAqAWPMz8w46VcDg3eU4W2qvIV0zov9AIce96AIdvgXTqgOt4Aim5Xtxds3Hr-fLTObhUoRBX7sVnqj_vy14ZPSTgipBcooL9LTVfQaw=&c=v6cIRXVJxaoLwvupPyiYjcSlhpEiLcbREGHAUhvLPrWl7pVNhCYJxA==&ch=4YWUhz4CQYYVEvZjAjU7aGxF4uBwT4aZNbg4PPT_Ys-iF_bCBC-3SA==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
---
| The crisis at our southern border gets worse by the month. Now, Joe Biden is directing border patrol officers to focus on the humanitarian crisis created by his administration's failure to secure the border, instead of doing their jobs keeping dangerous people and drugs out of our country. Every border patrol agent who is assigned to manage all the people the Biden Administration has allowed to illegally enter and remain in our country is one less agent stopping gangs, Fentanyl, and other drugs from coming across the border. A secure border makes communities in Washington State safer and that needs to be our priority again. Border security shouldn't be a partisan issue. It should be about doing what's right for our country. [Help end the border crisis by making a contribution to Team Smiley today! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017VOvyRLoAioI8DwhInPY7M3kYYnlQx43FD4QL5Ss3iQDPxuVm_xRnmc3UYhWdDw6y9tBH8zJBZ4BHPSoUJPu-zxF_6XI5v4DSqpoBdQHleQdgB-DQLEPER-V9nIPkHEqyxNqeIlEBwwW455A8GvwsIPVgVZdQwT76zaHAqAWPMz8w46VcDg3eU4W2qvIV0zov9AIce96AIdvgXTqgOt4Aim5Xtxds3Hr-fLTObhUoRBX7sVnqj_vy14ZPSTgipBcooL9LTVfQaw=&c=v6cIRXVJxaoLwvupPyiYjcSlhpEiLcbREGHAUhvLPrWl7pVNhCYJxA==&ch=4YWUhz4CQYYVEvZjAjU7aGxF4uBwT4aZNbg4PPT_Ys-iF_bCBC-3SA==)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I remember
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I remember when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago. I wasn’t sure what to expect. One of my biggest concerns was whether or not we’d have the resources to win an expensive race with wild amounts of outside money spent to beat me.
#
Friends,
I remember when I first launched my campaign for Senate more than 2 years ago.

I wasn’t sure what to expect. One of my biggest concerns was whether or not we’d have the resources to win an expensive race with wild amounts of outside money spent to beat me.

But then, minutes after we announced, a teacher from Tucson made one of the first donations and we were off...

We’ve received hundreds of thousands of donations since then, funding our campaign with grassroots support that I’m very proud of. You should be too.

Today, I’m asking if you can chip in. Our mid-month deadline is right around the corner and we’ve got a lot of ground to make up to reach our goals.

Can I count on you?
**[I’m humbly asking if you can split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s before our mid-month fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight tonight? I need your help to reach our goals.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37503782/311358945/637636758?refcode=jr_em_nd_211013_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmZlNDBiMy00YjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT-SAaw71Chfm1xHkEtZU2I-WGJ2g7ukwR47a5OzGF4=)**
Thank you,
Mark Kelly

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37503783/311358946/637636758?refcode=jr_em_nd_211013_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmZlNDBiMy00YjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT-SAaw71Chfm1xHkEtZU2I-WGJ2g7ukwR47a5OzGF4=)**

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Why did the Republican chickens cross the road?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Sadly enough, because Trump was on the other side. Sisters and Brothers, the Trump threat is real, and Republicans are too chicken to stand up to him. [_**But I know you 're not afraid and I need your help.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AGk6evS2_ET1KNCqDf3-ejBHKXuj51N4vJDf_SnDzoM=/yqalDu4VXl9yD9Ps5HKNoLyRgFYv-J9IrFAFkcVGDH8=?refcode=101321)

Last Saturday, Donald John Trump held a campaign-style rally in Iowa. Since January 6th, Trump rallies have been kryptonite to Republican leadership until now. Trump's Iowa rally, prominent Iowa Republicans who denounced Trump's involvement in the Capitol Insurrection, crossed the road like chickens last weekend and showed up en masse, namely Senator Chuck Grassley and Representative Ashley Hinson.
Sisters and Brothers, the threat is real. I know Senator Grassley and Representative Hinson. They did the right thing holding Trump accountable for the Capitol Insurrection. **But now, they are so desperate for support for their upcoming elections, they are attracted to Trump rallies like flies to $hit.**
They are willing to sacrifice America's moral compass for personal gain. [_**Will you help me stop them?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/AGk6evS2_ET1KNCqDf3-ejBHKXuj51N4vJDf_SnDzoM=/yqalDu4VXl9yD9Ps5HKNoLyRgFYv-J9IrFAFkcVGDH8=?refcode=101321)

name: Trump 2020 Campaign Manager
subject: Jim Renacci Stands With President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
| | Friend,

As president Trump’s former campaign manager, I can tell you that no one is more equipped to put **Ohio First** than Jim Renacci.

Just like President Trump, Jim is a successful businessman who will use his experience to solve the many crises facing Ohio. Thanks to DeWine, Ohio is the most corrupt state in the nation and one of the worst states for job creation.

While Ohio crumbles, DeWine has been busy forcing masks on children, creating vaccine lotteries, and brainwashing students with critical race theory.

On day one, Jim will fight to restore Ohio’s reputation and free our children.

As Ohioans we don’t have to wait until 2024 to solve our problems. Let’s fire DeWine and make Jim Renacci Governor.

Buckeyes can’t survive four more years of Do Nothing DeWine. If you believe that Renacci is Right, then consider investing in Ohio’s future and donate today.

name: Justin Lamorte, Bennet HQ
subject: re: our path forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado

Hi folks, I’m Justin and I’m Michael’s campaign manager. This race has really ramped up so I wanted to reach out to you personally with an update on our path to victory. You’re a critical part of Michael’s team so I hope you’ll read through, **[then pitch in $10 before Saturday’s mid-month deadline to re-elect Michael to the Senate and keep Colorado blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37504297/311361098/1929152467?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211013_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDcwMGJiNy00ZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnnSckJ1j8rADwBKZZGMp9h84_5BX8tABh2kmCUurdo=)** **WHERE WE ARE** Despite our slim Democratic majority and Mitch McConnell’s obstruction, Michael led the charge to expand the Child Tax Credit. The monthly payments helped one million Colorado children, kept three million children out of poverty nationally, and brought much-needed relief to parents. Now, Michael is determined to preserve this historic tax cut for lower- and middle-income families. Michael secured a historic investment in broadband — the largest federal broadband investment in our nation’s history — in the bipartisan infrastructure bill. This investment will help Americans compete in the 21st century economy and bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities. Michael delivers for Coloradans. But while he’s fighting to make our economy work for everyone and combat climate change, far-right opponents are jumping into the race to defeat him... **THE STATE OF THIS RACE** Michael is excited to run on his record of delivering for working people, but he is facing attacks from all sides. The National GOP announced they raised $25 million last quarter to flip seats like Michael’s, and in the past month alone, three right-wing opponents launched their campaigns to defeat Michael.
* One is an insurrectionist who admitted to crossing the police line on January 6th, joked about lynching, defended the Three-Fifths Compromise, and has traveled the country in support of conspiracy theories about the 2020 election.
* The second is a wealthy Trump appointee who opposes the expanded Child Tax Credit, which has reduced financial anxiety and food insecurity for families as they continue to recover from the pandemic.
* The third is so wealthy that he already self-funded a quarter million dollars and hired top Trump consultants to run his campaign.

The GOP primary field is stacked with seven candidates ready to attack Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off incoming attacks. **WHAT IT TAKES TO WIN** Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign, folks. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because that money often comes with strings attached and Michael answers to his constituents. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, Michael’s campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions and wealthy self-funded opponents jumping into the race, we can’t rest for a moment. **Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbc6345f65b94be09e9e1dcd726f2ef4&_e=0qqPrfzT6R7V4trgawRyrD_759fX9IptqIELO9LLntbRB4u8ANYM_l2hEYvmuHYnBs4KG0llh4KYoQDgy20DKlBTVWLavNR-jCMLIexCACD2MD5KJxvYFfnzbieb8l1xyNV1QKBOK_vHzDEHe4YbFZFzaULRBxYft9e1S9MuOeHSymDOsj8vAaN5IEcLpRdIZylrdlb7ujyyPDAyV5qlQ3AXUJp3bGFOwkmS5ckN5qEemCU2aaY4DuMf6QbdIxgBQSeGOwUWR0mhhaQFHZEe_xVSfQGefT-OJS29hlrHRuWIoeyMMmNBZHvy49A7En8Jl-5DubXKOZe3oH7rYvc8ea_mxQ3F2redF3IzlS7rVX6ShY4NyCvPYV8ew545A6jCZertwV7C6fqoMcmPl-V1ADK1PZahJuz-fjaRIXiJWEjsmVyfYRnVjiW3pCA3TabCsvZe4YzUe05OmUGRCobOq85JkS23AHecuwfBDbBYCda_6dAker-aYEC0BqGE7uRYxARpPkZBi19cWSognU662w%3D%3D)**

| _**

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, October 13th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbc6345f65b94be09e9e1dcd726f2ef4&_e=0qqPrfzT6R7V4trgawRyrD_759fX9IptqIELO9LLntbRB4u8ANYM_l2hEYvmuHYnBs4KG0llh4KYoQDgy20DKlBTVWLavNR-jCMLIexCACD2MD5KJxvYFfnzbieb8l1xyNV1QKBOK_vHzDEHe4YbFZFzaULRBxYft9e1S9MuOeHSymDOsj8vAaN5IEcLpRdIZylrdlb7ujyyPDAyV5qlQ3AXUJp3bGFOwkmS5ckN5qEemCU2aaY4DuMf6QbdIxgBQSeGOwUWR0mhhaQFHZEe_xVSfQGefT-OJS29hlrHRuWIoeyMMmNBZHvy49A7En8Jsn8CdafXYWHc__ZmNh7mDDkcZKxByXoD_NQK6eprOopxprOY9tpii8SvPNGD1ZIP8iT4xngHi9peedWA0smGb8LJCmcoqmd2xg25tCfqfoOGZ7x4BLWt48fMq5euglmxYHxlzMDcbNO9cIXkVpMUTswGLkC8lYMrN8uZBfpVpDNsrXjYOn69EYfl55hPwQM5tzyHLOnhruHLNsOZQX7cBA%3D%3D)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fbc6345f65b94be09e9e1dcd726f2ef4&_e=0qqPrfzT6R7V4trgawRyrD_759fX9IptqIELO9LLntbRB4u8ANYM_l2hEYvmuHYnBs4KG0llh4KYoQDgy20DKlBTVWLavNR-jCMLIexCACD2MD5KJxvYFfnzbieb8l1xyNV1QKBOK_vHzDEHe4YbFZFzaULRBxYft9e1S9MuOeHSymDOsj8vAaN5IEcLpRdIZylrdlb7ujyyPDAyV5qlQ3AXUJp3bGFOwkmS5ckN5qEemCU2aaY4DuMf6QbdIxgBQSeGOwUWR0mhhaQFHZEe_xVSfQGefT-OJS29hlrHRuWIoeyMMmNBZHvy49A7En8Jq9vIL_RHe5cxUTRGEv54i_Hc6I2pIr5RDik7FVCpUlosvrSotX-Ov0VPKbhSxKPnI3SfXXLjskNkFxsVWzk0naaPCG-gBeZI04A3HGl0Nhr-gBsi5a8g0UuvdhYh6r1i7zIF9fy9tbEUwicr_4-Ay3Q63Qs-InsxzmAwMlwFcoRJwhn_UQM83RbHE-fnXlvFweU1gsX1i15fWi5H6qtYiw%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,

Cheri has what it takes to get people energized and engaged in this election.
#

MSNBC’s Joy Ann Reid just said that the South represents a major opportunity for Democrats to expand our majority in the U.S. Senate.
If we want to make sure Democrats have the numbers to defeat Mitch McConnell and Republicans’ obstructionism, we are going to have to win races in the South — including North Carolina’s open Senate seat.
This race in particular is a big deal — it could be the difference between implementing President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda or more Republican obstructionism. And Cheri is the candidate in this race with the experience and background to win statewide.
So today, we are asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Cheri Beasley for North Carolina? Cheri is Democrats’ best hope to win North Carolina and keep control of the Senate, but she can’t get there alone. Andy's focus is on building a strong future for Kentucky -- one where everyone has access to quality public education, a good-paying job, and affordable healthcare.

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I hope you'll let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Today I'm asking for you to contribute just $1 to our campaign. Let me explain why:

My team and I have an important mid-month fundraising deadline on Friday, and the truth is: $1 can go a long way toward helping us reach our $6,000 goal. If 2,000 people reading this email chipped in just $1, we'd raise $2,000!

That kind of money would help us make the necessary early investments for a successful re-election campaign. $2,000 could purchase new online advertisements, buy supplies for future volunteers, and so much more. **And all of that from YOU chipping in just $1!**

**[So, what do you say? Can I count on you to donate $1 today? Rush a donation before our mid-month deadline to help us reach our $6,000 goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9qmfVgwF0NvzRZjN31FmBUlTeIeSbnm7-qgcH3QU3Gg=/SBtV865gLM949eTFKFsE2iaNAV2pux0ZJumRzVcdJ5w=?refcode=em21_211013_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211013_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Now that I've explained the "how," let's talk about the "why." Here's the deal: with Republicans only five seats away from regaining control of the House majority, we can't take a single seat for granted.

If we lose the House majority, not only do we lose the chance to keep making progress for working families, but we risk moving backward and rolling back all that we've accomplished. I'm already facing potential challengers from the far-right, so it's critical for us to start building the infrastructure we need to defend this seat now.

**[Your support couldn't come at a better time. Will you donate $1 to help us meet our mid-month goal and defend the House majority?](https://act.myngp.com/el/9qmfVgwF0NvzRZjN31FmBUlTeIeSbnm7-qgcH3QU3Gg=/SBtV865gLM949eTFKFsE2iaNAV2pux0ZJumRzVcdJ5w=?refcode=em21_211013_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211013_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/9qmfVgwF0NvzRZjN31FmBUlTeIeSbnm7-qgcH3QU3Gg=/SBtV865gLM949eTFKFsE2iaNAV2pux0ZJumRzVcdJ5w=?refcode=em21_211013_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211013_mm1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Giffords
subject: Every one of these flowers is a life that could be saved.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
That’s how many Americans die from gun violence each year.
#

**_40,000._**
That’s the number of Americans who die from gun violence every year. As a testament to their loss and the need for change, Giffords is bringing our Gun Violence Memorial to cities across America, like last week in New York City.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1087_3935704_C9iD_3&akid=1087%2E3935704%2EC9iD_3)
Every one of these flowers is a life that could be saved. Every one is a person whose hopes and dreams are stolen, their lives cut short by a bullet.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1087_3935704_C9iD_3&akid=1087%2E3935704%2EC9iD_3)
We are at a crossroads. We can either let the shootings continue OR we can take action to keep our families and communities safe.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1087_3935704_C9iD_3&akid=1087%2E3935704%2EC9iD_3)
As our founder Gabby Giffords says, “Now is the time to come together — Democrats, Republicans, everyone.” This fight takes courage and persistence. We know how to save lives from gun violence, but we can’t do it alone.
[**So please, make a $3 contribution to help us keep up the fight to end gun violence in our communities. Your donation will help pass gun safety legislation and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-subs&t=4&refcode2=1087_3935704_C9iD_3&akid=1087%2E3935704%2EC9iD_3)
All our best,
The team at Giffords
**Congress has dragged their feet on passing gun safety legislation for far too long. Our Gun Violence Memorial demonstrates that sad fact visually in a way that cannot be ignored.**
[**Donate $3 today and your contribution will be put immediately to work in a campaign to pressure Congress to pass gun safety legislation and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-subs&t=5&refcode2=1087_3935704_C9iD_3&akid=1087%2E3935704%2EC9iD_3)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-subs&t=6&refcode2=1087_3935704_C9iD_3&akid=1087%2E3935704%2EC9iD_3)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1087%2E3935704%2EC9iD_3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking you to help us flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ][IMG]

Hello,

I know what it takes to win in Ohio.

You win Ohio by talking to workers — because whether you punch a clock,
swipe a badge, take home tips, or care for loved ones, ALL work has
dignity.

That’s why we have to elect Tim Ryan, and give Ohio another Democratic
Senator who will fight tirelessly for working people. I couldn’t have won
my competitive race in 2018 without grassroots support. So, I’m personally
asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5076?t=1007&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Will you make a donation to Tim Ryan’s campaign before midnight to help
us flip this seat blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? If we
want to win this race, we’ll need YOUR support.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5076?t=1008&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5077?t=1009&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5078?t=1010&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5079?t=1011&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5080?t=1012&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5076?t=1013&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Other Amount

One of Tim’s opponents — far-right extremist and Trump’s #1 fan Josh
Mandel — already tried and failed twice to unseat me. If anyone knows how
to beat Josh, it’s me.

And Tim’s other GOP opponents? They’re a bunch of millionaires who
couldn’t care less about working people. Billionaire tech giant Peter
Thiel is even funding a super PAC supporting JD Vance for crying out loud.

But here’s the good news: recent polling shows that no matter who Tim’s
opponent is, this race is a dead heat. We fought back against Trump’s best
efforts and overcame nasty GOP attacks to win re-election in 2018. Tim
will need that same grassroots power this time around.

There’s no question this race will be as tough as it gets and could come
down to a handful of votes. Tim’s team needs resources today — not just
next year — to lay the groundwork for victory. So, I’m personally asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5081?t=1014&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Make a contribution of $10 or more to help Tim build the resources he
needs to expand the Democratic Senate majority and give Ohioans two
pro-worker Senators on their side.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5076?t=1015&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5077?t=1016&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5078?t=1017&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5079?t=1018&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5080?t=1019&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5076?t=1020&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Other Amount

I’ve spent my entire career fighting for working people and their
families, because if you love this country, you fight for the people who
make it work. Tim is fighting to cut workers in on the deal and together,
we’ll do just that.

Thanks so much,

Sherrod

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2 ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1145%2E3611125%2Edx_iA2
