name: Trump News HQ
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhsljesr2gplc6jpj7bd0q3j39iqa8faigm4dum8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chgm1o34c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zptc1ej4e85m8q8sg6ghtj34mhttd6sa2b5k53h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chgm1o34c3h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv5qvls1d6vdaim1co68ke27pi3ocuv8949f97bg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chgm1o34c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbu4tossgus1t340vce2qijl1nc3dlckm755fuq0_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hcp2fodhte0i4bq63hocebkh7ieuhqijde1h7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chgm1o34c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

| MAGA Champion Eric Greitens Dominating Missouri Senate Race According to President Trump's Pollster
---
| As reported by the [Washington Examiner,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012RyXMle1RSVfJxk4ZiEDGaqa6MbDpnp5ISDuYFbABYyqZx9dJqjv4SehoNYfw2S9qsCz4lxwJGTzYQ5jZGvPruM-jo1udatPE-TtPtpsEuSb4PsczodsDLOsFKBzsNO92VDYO3uwqh-sxtdyGbjTNkfKTQXp8OcPa-UaJhDQ_3WUKp9CyyQZa23DkjjWsqraRxkXxElqPQ85rHNReX5Nvjttroa8QFqlVRgAIpnbUl5e_pnYgVL88lBtlHcOD3ajpNH2P7BkCjMzxY4IVNZbwQ==&c=DG1FqvnUFz0n35EQF0rMCN8IqzbJ52DwOTMOvtsm6Y0y5OZRkNp8Qw==&ch=eaBScfzm4fkGEAI2pke2qPAjki_l87UQGjZXswk6OeTWphU76RJaVA==) President Trump's pollster finds MAGA champion and former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens holds a massive lead in the 2022 GOP primary for the US Senate-- a lead which increases when voters are told of his vow to vote against reelecting Mitch McConnell as Republican leader.
New [Fabrizio, Lee & Associates ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012RyXMle1RSVfJxk4ZiEDGaqa6MbDpnp5ISDuYFbABYyqZx9dJqjv4SehoNYfw2S9BnAXOB_SJFozZlbdGDaBZf7Qv3Azbra7TwhUX99WmR-VYwaPuAE8gU9PdWy9Ug31SuGIkTUNsvdYL5GyuO0Mag==&c=DG1FqvnUFz0n35EQF0rMCN8IqzbJ52DwOTMOvtsm6Y0y5OZRkNp8Qw==&ch=eaBScfzm4fkGEAI2pke2qPAjki_l87UQGjZXswk6OeTWphU76RJaVA==)polling shows Governor Greitens leading his Republican challengers in the 2022 race by double digits. He currently has 36% support in the race, and leads his nearest opponent by 19 points.
However, Governor Greitens' lead expands further when voters are told of his pledge to remove McConnell as Republican leader in the Senate, jumping from 36 percent support to 44 percent support-- extending Governor Greitens' lead from 19 points to 30 points.
In the memo, Fabrizio Lee writes, "Greitens holds a very healthy lead over his competitors, receiving more than double the vote of his closest challenger. Greitens' 36%, in a crowded field, will be extremely difficult to surpass with only 25% undecided."

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us.
#

Friends —
I know we send you a lot of emails. But in just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important to our chances.
Here is the truth:
In just a few days, our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end. And when it does, we’re going to take stock of the ads running against us and the resources we need to fight back.
It’s no secret, we are a top target of the corporate special interests who will do and spend whatever it takes to defeat us. They spent millions against us in 2020, and they’re already doing it again in this election.
We won last time because we built the largest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. That’s just a fact. We received millions of donations and ran an unprecedented volunteer effort.
But the dark money groups are already back, and that means we need to rebuild a grassroots campaign of similar size, or even larger, if we’re going to win again.
Right now, only about 10% of the people who gave in the last campaign have given to this one. So we have to pick up the pace, and this mid-month fundraising drive is an important marker. And that’s why it’s so important for me to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end this week? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1520_6688874_xeIOJq&akid=1520%2E6688874%2ExeIOJq)

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Let me break it down.
body:
Kevin McCarthy is stooping lower than ever by continuing to push Trump's "Big Lie" about the 2020 election. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37506554/311371552/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzIxMGNkNS01NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mdsB4ByCYtrhiLM3SwZdij7h7KwnIwncFxPYHpJjmg=)
Quick update, friend.

**We just got word that Kevin McCarthy raised over $14 million in the last quarter in his bid to take back the House and become Speaker.** That number may seem large, but in this email, I'm going to explain how it happened and why we can DEFEAT McCarthy at the ballot box. Let me break this down:

**Kevin McCarthy is stooping lower than ever by continuing to push Trump's "Big Lie" about the 2020 election.** Pundits are calling it "an extreme MAGA makeover," which is exactly why the far-right donor base has rushed to fill his coffers after January 6th.

If McCarthy's tenure wasn't bad enough already, now he's completely ignoring Central Valley families by operating lockstep with Trump's agenda. He's stood firmly against COVID-19 relief -- but when it comes to stopping the Jan 6th investigation, he's all in.

**We need to make sure that undecided voters in our community know that Kevin has turned his back on us, but in order to do so, we need to raise the funds needed to staff our field effort. That's where you come in:**

**[We're setting a rush goal of raising $25,000 by the end of the week to push back against the right-wing cash dump coming in for McCarthy. Will you chip in $3 to help us hit our goal? The truth is that fundraising is just one small part of winning an election. It's important to remember where McCarthy's money is coming from and why, and how voters will make their choice at the ballot box.

But there is a baseline of funds we need to fund our voter contact effort. I've been amazed at how many grassroots donors have chipped in already. With this goal in front of us, I would be grateful if you'd **[make a contribution of $3 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37506565/311371563/-787496292?refcode=em-101321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzIxMGNkNS01NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6mdsB4ByCYtrhiLM3SwZdij7h7KwnIwncFxPYHpJjmg=)**

name: Team Heinrich
subject: PETITION: Authorize COVID-19 vaccines for kids 12 and under as soon as science allows
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37507452/311375837/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc4M2UyOS01OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRKs0uDlAJDdy_d9e7C19_mE36o7f9cc3KfGM9YcH8I=&emci=75f9d464-4c2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=93783e29-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Since the start of the pandemic, more than 5 million children have tested positive for COVID-19. With a vaccine for kids under 12 still not available, pediatric infection rates are rising as the Delta variant spreads. That’s why Martin is calling on the Food and Drug Administration to authorize a COVID-19 vaccine for young children as soon as science allows. Authorizing vaccines for kids is the best way to protect them, as well as their parents, educators, and caregivers. After months of instability and hardships, we cannot afford to wait any longer than absolutely necessary. [**If you agree, sign Martin’s petition urging the FDA to authorize a safe and effective vaccine for children under the age of 12 — as quickly and safely as science allows.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37507453/311375838/-1753012879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc4M2UyOS01OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRKs0uDlAJDdy_d9e7C19_mE36o7f9cc3KfGM9YcH8I=&emci=75f9d464-4c2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=93783e29-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37507454/311375839/-1753012879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc4M2UyOS01OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wRKs0uDlAJDdy_d9e7C19_mE36o7f9cc3KfGM9YcH8I=&emci=75f9d464-4c2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=93783e29-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=252045)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Ramirez?=
subject: We need to know
body:
Do you agree with Terry McAuliffe? | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=77e553a82f&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

Did you see what Terry McAuliffe said about our children in the gubernatorial debate?
“I don’t think parents should be telling schools what they should teach.”
\- Democrat Terry McAuliffe
Tina Ramirez knows that it is her right as a parent to decide what her daughter is taught.

But we want to know what you think, Friend. If you _agree_ that as a parent, it is YOUR right to have a say in what your children are taught, [**please sign our petition below**.](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=da11dda7dc&e=ae0ea222da)

body:
| Hey there, My campaign team and I were talking earlier. I think that surely most of our supporters believe in our plan to legalize marijuana and use the tax revenue to reinvest in our communities. _Some of the team_ want to see the numbers. **So can you help me out? Let me know below if you support legalization in Ohio so I can take the poll numbers back to our team:** | **_Do you support marijuana legalization in Ohio?_** | [I'M ALL FOR IT!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37507610/311376627/-1795339629?refcode=ea.d6492cdc-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&mc=ea.d6492cdc-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ5MmNkYy01OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOVyP8mlbIfxuPYUkOGbF4D08pP7g0e5FidQ1iqan8o=&emci=5fdd74db-492c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=d6492cdc-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22604289) | [NOT THERE YET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37507616/311376636/-1795339629?refcode=ea.d6492cdc-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&mc=ea.d6492cdc-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQ5MmNkYy01OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOVyP8mlbIfxuPYUkOGbF4D08pP7g0e5FidQ1iqan8o=&emci=5fdd74db-492c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=d6492cdc-592c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22604289)

Look, we’ve seen the facts. States that have legalized marijuana sales have generated nearly **$8 billion** in tax revenue — that’s money that can go into repairing failing infrastructure or investing in underserved communities.
That could be money in the bank to get to work starting our comeback — and it’s why we will prioritize legalizing marijuana in Ohio when I’m elected governor.
**_[Let me know if you support legalization by taking our one question poll. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Facebook Silent on Our Ban
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=1)
---
October 13th, 2021
## Facebook Silent on Our Ban
Facebook has been silent and unresponsive since they [unpublished and banned our popular Action 4 Liberty page](https://www.action4liberty.com/facebook_unpublished_and_banned_action_4_liberty_page?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=2) for supposedly violating their **Communist Standards** on "graphic violence". Luckily for us, we've spent a lot of money on Facebook in the past 18 months to bring people like you into our email system. We knew the Facebook Authoritarians were eventually going to give us the boot for telling the truth about lockdowns, masks and vaccine mandates. So we invested in an alternative method of communicating to our growing audience of patriots. **_Unfortunately for the COVID Cult in Silicon Valley, the ban from Facebook has limited impact on Action 4 Liberty since we can still communicate directly with you! Plus, we are making tens of thousands of phone calls and doorknocks every week to stop STOP the Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota._** With that said, people obviously still want to hear from us using social media platforms and I would like YOUR OPINION on where to put our message. Please take this short survey (it takes only one minute) and tell us which social media platforms you prefer.
# [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://www.action4liberty.com/social_media_survey?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=3)
Also, we already have a presence on alternative some social media sites. You can follow us here:
* ## [GAB](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=nCFiSi5EqFwe8Y-CGDEkGoUjczEr-sXN18eBFgzZ6nU&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=4)
* ## [Telegram](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=WNpqHdUpTKYCTPUJncBwWdokDLTyHzCqGOO7BSX1vWU&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=5)
* ## [MeWe](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=wOS25Vjpu227hOSb_-Kw8o1C6ZvvT-jYRW2sQvIfKIFtFCQPPYf0wZj1IGUPBdmT&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=6)

**Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=7 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=7)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_silent_on_our_ban&n=9).

**BREAKING NEWS FROM IOWA:
_Sen. Grassley enthusiastically accepts Trump's "COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT"_**
**Peter – this weekend, Sen. Grassley (R-IA) appeared alongside Donald Trump at an Iowa MAGA rally where Trump gave Sen. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement." **With this rally and endorsement, the twice-impeached former president has officially launched his comeback tour, which starts with taking back the Senate for Republicans and ends with him sitting in the Oval Office. And Sen. Grassley has made it clear he will be right alongside him.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37508058/311378692/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk318-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGY3YzFhNy01YzJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiHY4i1sE7g2rhSHNztXH3gYgPaqQcmQ3i5T9MHVYMc=)
After Trump spent four years wreaking havoc on our country and then tried to overturn the results of the election, we cannot allow him to take back political power – and we cannot allow the Republicans who aided and abetted him, like Sen. Grassley, to take back the Senate. **That's why Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat blue – is running to defeat Sen. Grassley.[We need a surge in grassroots support to fight back against Trump and Sen. Our country is _finally_ getting on a better path forward after a long, tumultuous and dangerous four years of Donald Trump in the White House. But without our Democratic majorities in Congress – and with people like Mitch McConnell and Chuck Grassley once again calling the shots in Washington – all the progress we've been fighting for could be lost.
And after the events of this weekend, it's clear that Trump is ready to use every tool at his disposal to keep Iowa red for Sen. Grassley – including his $100 million campaign war chest. But the good news is that 64% of Iowans DON'T want to reelect Sen. Grassley, and if Abby defeats him and flips Iowa blue, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold the Senate. **But we need major resources to compete against Trump and Grassley, which is why we must hit our rapid-response fundraising goal of $10,000 before midnight TONIGHT. Will you chip in now?**
**[**Rush a donation of $5 right now so we have the resources to counter Trump's attacks, defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa and defend our Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37508060/311378694/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk318-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGY3YzFhNy01YzJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiHY4i1sE7g2rhSHNztXH3gYgPaqQcmQ3i5T9MHVYMc=)**

But the good news is that 64% of Iowans DON'T want to reelect Sen. Grassley, and if Abby defeats him and flips Iowa blue, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold the Senate. But we need major resources to compete against Trump and Grassley, which is why we must hit our rapid-response fundraising goal of $10,000 before midnight TONIGHT. Will you chip in now? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

Peter,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. ### **October 13, 2021**
In our newest roundup, check out the latest updates from the Republican Party of Wisconsin on local events happening throughout the state! **Upcoming Events:**
* 10/14: [Jackson County Candidate Training](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOWiwY_ZsHYnQjfc4D2iJJf-JkmDZtT7pG96Xl0ZNSfKxg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=2)
* 10/16: [Mequon Recall Door Knocking](https://act.wisgop.org/mtsd_doorrsvp_1009_20211016?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=3)
* 10/16: [Eau Claire New Leaders Campaign Training](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=kZ--hKxH8oXUM59qczNfwZHnqHVp9QVK-Fk0Zodx7lZzqii7_Vei-aWphP7-fX42&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=4)
* 10/17: [Walworth Feet on the Street](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=eAu9797CEVPLoOW--wrbiqa4jNUn7T4ohOArX9YPxmQIqH57HjVBMcI6Iki43e-Chf1HtCOconIaMToDw5Dj0jgP8_GPQD9CxHp--_p06CHyWm5fng6gbZqgqbeszRWUl3IiajWDiyz1bYAgFAY46dJivqqshFjf4vZrN2JyBKELY5Tdg6fylm0udIfKpWtgJmny7JmfSTUggc6kRCGyLw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=5)
* 10/23: [Walworth Youth Rally](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=fWKLTmiGZuMQ8phTIViid8aR8oMgKLBsmSt4gQKEt4HpnMGZWhfOxORRiiYd2T6piMBR6E-HM_MYUrIOQFC4Lq7Np1B_aAZSIBwylrnOhhE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=6)
* 10/23: [Racine County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWdmUmjV8W55ylOYaOP2EqLjk7WRIQZplMDS6nc98yYPX5NJzNcmOOqwqdNX1fm9y-szSLMLqMaFR2na96zhs_6WaKXqhklJlOfxeVnpSZUym&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=7)
* 10/26: [Jackson County Candidate Training](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nmUUukZrx1xgsPFq6NPPOWscP_Wa8gdmmKGVjLkkmXBkw4R6jalLaCYSEzl1SQJ1Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=8)

| [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=9 "FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU") [FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=9)
---
* * *
**Green County Candidate Trainings**
Dozens of patriots interested in running for local office joined the Green County GOP for candidate trainings equipping them with the tools to run a successful campaign.
**Waukesha County Pints & Politics**
WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow joined the Waukesha County GOP for a successful Pints & Politics covering key 2022 issues over great beverages!
**Lafayette County Cheese Fest**
The Lafayette County GOP collected petitions and met with potential new members at the community Cheese Fest.
**Vilas County Town Hall**
Senator Ron Johnson joined Boulder Junction constituents for a town hall covering key topics such as illegal immigration, vaccine mandates, election integrity, and more.
**Grant County Pints & Politics**
The Grant County GOP hosted their first ever Pints & Politics event with a great turnout!
**Waupaca County Gun Show**
The Waupaca County GOP hosted a booth at their local gun show to share conversations about how Republicans are defending Wisconsinites' Second Amendment rights.
**Washington County Pints & Politics**
Speakers rallied the troops at the Washington County GOP Pints & Politics event.
**St. Croix County Reagan Day Dinner**
Patriots gathered in St. Croix County for a successful Reagan Day Dinner in support of conservative policies.
* * *
### Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=10) to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=11).
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=12) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=13) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=14) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekend_roundup_2021_10_13_v3&n=15)

name: Ken Russell
subject: Don’t ignore this email, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
I’m coming to you right now for your input in my strategy to WIN and represent you in the U.S. Senate.

|
---

| | Peter, let me explain:

_**[I’m coming to you right now for your input in my strategy to WIN and represent you in the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37508263/311379535/1307473601?contactdata=%2FVXykX0BOSM1Rh8nZtHwCMycP%2BJdct8JUmA3xq2RUcTN1HBfcB3wU4x88d4Azj7x6JBJtDQHhbr%2BxmoHeXOhXqeq8Nih2%2FIcJM6ImcTSFI5j2dyD%2BsBWUCIJa4NYTH7gBJVeNXjP2KwJiXFgxNkUEWwNqp2NqhZGN40MardcxCq7Ys7xgjdRhBP29YjuiP8M&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTM5ZDdiYi01ZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=78ZyQNMXv75pqJjR3zrlBOcRlS34XOJJkQWXo4rBpls=&emci=d9bf7d47-5d2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=0539d7bb-5e2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22995843)**_

Just like you, I’m sick and tired of listening to Republican politicians say they’ll put our needs first -- just to watch them follow in lockstep with Mitch McConnell and their radical base.

That’s why I’m doing things differently, Peter.

I’m reaching out directly to you to make sure your voice and your needs are heard.

**So don’t skip this email, Peter.**

Don’t let your voice continue to go unheard.

I’m asking you to take just 29-quick seconds to take my October Priorities Survey and tell me what issues you’d like me to focus on.

_**[I’d be so grateful to hear what you have to say. Will you make sure to get in your response before my survey closes in just 48 hours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37508264/311379538/1307473601?contactdata=%2FVXykX0BOSM1Rh8nZtHwCMycP%2BJdct8JUmA3xq2RUcTN1HBfcB3wU4x88d4Azj7x6JBJtDQHhbr%2BxmoHeXOhXqeq8Nih2%2FIcJM6ImcTSFI5j2dyD%2BsBWUCIJa4NYTH7gBJVeNXjP2KwJiXFgxNkUEWwNqp2NqhZGN40MardcxCq7Ys7xgjdRhBP29YjuiP8M&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTM5ZDdiYi01ZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=78ZyQNMXv75pqJjR3zrlBOcRlS34XOJJkQWXo4rBpls=&emci=d9bf7d47-5d2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=0539d7bb-5e2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22995843)**_

Ken

Friend,
We must hold the United States Forest Service and Bureau of Land Management accountable for their red tape, over-regulation, and attacks on our farmers, ranchers, and fossil fuel industries.
**Their mismanagement has resulted in the destruction of some of our most important natural resources.** They are responsible for our catastrophic forest fires, uncontrolled insect infestations, destruction of our watersheds, and devastating job and financial losses to our communities.
Our ancestors did NOT settle here, develop our communities, build our businesses, and create this great State known as Wyoming just to have Unelected Bureaucrats in Washington DC issue counterproductive and destructive land use policies that affect us all. I have spent years fighting against the DC Bureaucrats to stop their overreaching unconstitutional regulations. Liz Cheney, on the other hand, focuses her energy on furthering the interests of the DC and Northern Virginia elites, while giving Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi cover to implement the most radical agenda this country has ever seen.
Wyoming deserves a Representative that understands these important land and water use issues. I am running for Congress to represent Wyoming, our values, and our interests. clean_body: | | | | Stop regulations from DC Bureaucrats Friend, We must hold the United States Forest Service and Bureau of Land Management accountable for their red tape, over-regulation, and attacks on our farmers, ranchers, and fossil fuel industries. Their mismanagement has resulted in the destruction of some of our most important natural resources. They are responsible for our catastrophic forest fires, uncontrolled insect infestations, destruction of our watersheds, and devastating job and financial losses to our communities. Our ancestors did NOT settle here, develop our communities, build our businesses, and create this great State known as Wyoming just to have Unelected Bureaucrats in Washington DC issue counterproductive and destructive land use policies that affect us all. I have spent years fighting against the DC Bureaucrats to stop their overreaching unconstitutional regulations. Liz Cheney, on the other hand, focuses her energy on furthering the interests of the DC and Northern Virginia elites, while giving Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi cover to implement the most radical agenda this country has ever seen. Wyoming deserves a Representative that understands these important land and water use issues. I am running for Congress to represent Wyoming, our values, and our interests. When I get to Congress, I will always work to protect Wyoming, our communities, and our businesses. When I get to Congress, I will fight federal regulations. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Team O'Halleran Update
subject: Tom is working to protect telehealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
In a state like Arizona, it is hard for some to get access to local health care, and Tom knows just how important it is to have access to these critical services. One significant way Arizonans have come to rely on health care is through telehealth.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37508936/311385191/1053376810?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.13_b1_ohua_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI2YTM2ZC02MDJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sqy2s7LhfdhmuBoLtgJUtonUSWV5r15JW1XNVgdsm6s=)**
Friends --

In a state like Arizona, it is hard for some to get access to local health care, and Tom knows just how important it is to have access to these critical services. One significant way Arizonans have come to rely on health care is through telehealth.

That’s why Tom introduced a bill in Congress to help bring more access to telehealth solutions for Arizonans. Many Arizonans must drive long hours to receive basic health care, and this bill will make those services more accessible and affordable.

Tom has been busy working in Congress to tackle important issues we all care about, and he will always fight to expand access to health care services. But he is facing one of the most competitive elections in the entire country next year.

We’re coming up on our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’re going to need your help to stay on pace to meet our goal. If we don’t meet our goal, we risk losing this election and Tom leaving Congress. [**Will you chip in $5 today to Tom’s campaign so that we can keep him in Congress working on the crucial issues?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37508938/311385192/1053376810?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.13_b1_ohua_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmI2YTM2ZC02MDJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sqy2s7LhfdhmuBoLtgJUtonUSWV5r15JW1XNVgdsm6s=)

clean_body: In a state like Arizona, it is hard for some to get access to local health care, and Tom knows just how important it is to have access to these critical services. One significant way Arizonans have come to rely on health care is through telehealth. = Friends -- In a state like Arizona, it is hard for some to get access to local health care, and Tom knows just how important it is to have access to these critical services. One significant way Arizonans have come to rely on health care is through telehealth. That’s why Tom introduced a bill in Congress to help bring more access to telehealth solutions for Arizonans. Many Arizonans must drive long hours to receive basic health care, and this bill will make those services more accessible and affordable. Tom has been busy working in Congress to tackle important issues we all care about, and he will always fight to expand access to health care services. But he is facing one of the most competitive elections in the entire country next year. We’re coming up on our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’re going to need your help to stay on pace to meet our goal. If we don’t meet our goal, we risk losing this election and Tom leaving Congress. = | ******=**** ****=**** = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = \-- O'Halleran Update Alert Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. Another week, another series of crises thanks to Biden's socialist agenda. It was never meant to "build back" anything - it was always about appeasing his radical, authoritarian base. Dan Crenshaw is preparing for a 2022 campaign that will absolutely CRUSH the Democrats in Congress who let this happen. But he needs your INPUT to build the most effective messaging strategy.

body:
Donald Trump recently told four of his former aides to defy the January 6 committee's subpoenas. Trump incited a violent insurrection at our Capitol, and now he's trying to block the House investigation from uncovering the extent of his involvement so he can evade responsibility. We wanted to make sure you saw the news, team.

**Donald Trump recently told four of his former aides to defy the January 6 committee's subpoenas.** Trump incited a violent insurrection at our Capitol, and now he's trying to block the House investigation from uncovering the extent of his involvement so he can evade responsibility.

Fortunately, Nancy Pelosi and the committee are not backing down. They're hard at work to uncover the truth about January 6, but we **need** Republicans to comply with the investigation.

**[Add your name to thank Nancy Pelosi and demand that Republicans comply with her investigation in order to protect our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37509000/311385340/-519272164?ms=em21_211013_ja2_adv_gq_act___tna_ettx&refcode=em21_211013_ja2_adv_gq_act___tna_ettx&source=em21_211013_ja2_adv_gq_act___tna_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211013_ja2_adv_gq_act___tna_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=QPug8gMpndUa%2BePmLIygm%2FCVW30JXxciDJYeyBRIx08ZcYJugaVaSqAZ2q5We8DCPENiEgtNHtA0dV3GcVaFyiyhKna98p2uCbfUUR72aqSzkIT6q84nx1MyssrGXMGIYS%2FFuarBB%2FzNpUuXVdA8sw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1ODNhMWI4LTYwMmMtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pXoSOGH7hn_pj2E6sFEyP_oYaZSgadE58Zqf9OVkOvw=&emci=7abc05ff-402c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=7583a1b8-602c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=16335001)**

\--_Politico_ Team,

January 6, 2021 was one of the darkest days for our nation's democracy. A violent mob, incited by Donald Trump attacked our Capitol as Congress met to certify the results of the 2020 election. Following the insurrection, 147 Republicans in Congress voted to reject the results of a free and fair election.

In the months since, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have done everything in their power to rewrite history and escape accountability for the events of January 6.

Despite Republicans' attempts to block the truth, Nancy Pelosi took action and formed a select committee to investigate the attack on our Capitol. This investigation is underway in the House and is a huge step in the right direction to uncovering the truth, holding the responsible parties accountable, and defending our democracy.

But if history taught us anything, we can expect Republicans to do whatever it takes to impede the investigation and hide the truth from the American people. **Just earlier this week, it was revealed that Trump told four of his aides to defy the committee's subpoenas.**

Trump is trying to block testimony so we can't hold him or his allies accountable. We can't let them get away with it.

A violent mob, incited by Donald Trump attacked our Capitol as Congress met to certify the results of the 2020 election. Following the insurrection, 147 Republicans in Congress voted to reject the results of a free and fair election. In the months since, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have done everything in their power to rewrite history and escape accountability for the events of January 6. Despite Republicans' attempts to block the truth, Nancy Pelosi took action and formed a select committee to investigate the attack on our Capitol. This investigation is underway in the House and is a huge step in the right direction to uncovering the truth, holding the responsible parties accountable, and defending our democracy. But if history taught us anything, we can expect Republicans to do whatever it takes to impede the investigation and hide the truth from the American people. Just earlier this week, it was revealed that Trump told four of his aides to defy the committee's subpoenas. Trump is trying to block testimony so we can't hold him or his allies accountable. We can't let them get away with it. | Thanks, Never Again PAC Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

body:

---
Friends – My team just told me that **Mitch McConnell's dark money super PAC unleashed yet another massive ad buy in New Hampshire, targeting my campaign.** Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and they've made it clear that New Hampshire is their number one priority. In just the past few months, the Granite State has seen visits from Trump’s Republican cronies like Michael Flynn, Betsy DeVos, and Mike Pence. _Pence even said that New Hampshire is ground zero for taking back the Senate._ **Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and the rest of the GOP have a plan to take back the Senate, and it starts with flipping New Hampshire.** My last race was the closest in the country, and now, in 2022, experts are saying my Senate seat is one of the most vulnerable. If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, it will take a grassroots effort. **[We don't need megadonors like Republicans, but we do need people like you, friend, to give $5 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against these unrelenting attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37509200/311387210/-214106137?refcode=e20211013_one-nation-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZhNTJiZi02MTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dNl734I7r3pi-n9xbuumxBT8MTMHugtBwW2kLrYnZQk=)** | | [Count me in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37509201/311387211/-214106137?refcode=e20211013_one-nation-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZhNTJiZi02MTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dNl734I7r3pi-n9xbuumxBT8MTMHugtBwW2kLrYnZQk=)

Our Senate is split 50-50 and losing even one seat means losing our majority – affecting everything from climate change to the fate of Roe v. Wade. That's why it's crucial to respond to these attacks early and show Republicans that we're ready to defend this seat.
Your support is so important to me and my campaign, and we're counting on your help. **[So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help keep New Hampshire and the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37509202/311387212/-214106137?refcode=e20211013_one-nation-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZhNTJiZi02MTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dNl734I7r3pi-n9xbuumxBT8MTMHugtBwW2kLrYnZQk=)**
Thank you for your continued support.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

| | I’ll be blunt, Derek. A recent poll shows a tied race and I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now.

**_[We're well into early voting right now, with just weeks left. Can you make a matched donation before our midnight match deadline and help me stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37509789/311389886/-2023814932?refcode=20211013.5_TM_10CV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcwODc1MS02NDJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qirk4YMqv883Nl60T3QEHYDONUU10e4MpuyfnJF4cC8=)_**

I mean, think about it:

My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. Despite everything Donald Trump has done to our Democracy, his support for the Jan. 6 insurrection, and Trump's "big lie," **Youngkin endorsed another FOUR YEARS of Trump as president.**

_And,_ with _Roe v. Wade_ hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia.

Look, early voting has already begun, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win.

Don’t let it happen.

**_[Please contribute anything you can right now before our match expires at midnight — we can’t let Trumpism in America win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37509790/311389887/-2023814932?refcode=20211013.5_TM_10CV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcwODc1MS02NDJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qirk4YMqv883Nl60T3QEHYDONUU10e4MpuyfnJF4cC8=)_** | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37509791/311389888/-2023814932?refcode=20211013.5_TM_10CV&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcwODc1MS02NDJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qirk4YMqv883Nl60T3QEHYDONUU10e4MpuyfnJF4cC8=)**

This is an all-hands-on-deck moment.

With just weeks before Election Day, the latest Virginia polls show Democrats **NECK-AND-NECK** with Trump's Republicans. _**NO!!**_

If extremist Republicans pull off a victory in Virginia, we know they would take it as a sign that our House Majority is theirs for the taking.

**Not on our watch.**

We refuse to sit idly by and watch as Republicans build STAGGERING momentum and attempt to pack every level of government with Trump's loyalist cronies.

**[But we can't turn the tide on our own. That's why we're calling for a MASSIVE day of Democratic fundraising -- 1,500 gifts before midnight -- to defend our House Majority and ensure that no matter what happens in Virginia, Republicans know our House Majority is here to stay.](https://links.e.dccc.)**

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510021/311390869/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013rtr_bfm_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWY0OGZjYy02NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTNtj1N-Ab1bjSo-GQnATVE6LpnA7qy185qMAQSFJ2s=)
---
Friend, Laurie is a former small business owner, and like any small business owner, she knows that when something needs fixing, you need it fixed quickly. The same goes for farmers — when their equipment breaks down, every day they have to wait to get it fixed means less money in their pocket. Right to repair is the simple idea that manufacturers should sell the tools farmers need to quickly and efficiently repair their own equipment when it breaks down. Sounds simple, right? Unfortunately, farmers are forced to work under anti-competitive monopolies that have been created from the immense consolidation of the manufacturing industry. These massive companies that make and sell products would rather require farmers to pay out the nose for repairs, or even buy new equipment entirely, than give them the ability to fix it themselves. The bottom line: our farmers struggle while corporations profit. **While Republican Ryan Zinke will try to convince you he supports Montana’s farmers, the truth is he opposes right to repair and efforts to help family farms make ends meet.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510022/311390870/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013rtr_bfm_active_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWY0OGZjYy02NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTNtj1N-Ab1bjSo-GQnATVE6LpnA7qy185qMAQSFJ2s=)
---
How do we know? Because [he was just the keynote speaker](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510023/311390871/18689160?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWY0OGZjYy02NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTNtj1N-Ab1bjSo-GQnATVE6LpnA7qy185qMAQSFJ2s=&emci=b6f48fcc-662c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=baf48fcc-662c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=13640636) at a wine-and-dine industry event that opposes right to repair.
Laurie stands with Montana farmers. As a state legislator, she has consistently voted in favor of policies that would make it easier for farmers to repair their own equipment and continue making a living without paying an arm and a leg to large manufacturers who are more concerned with their bottom line than the paychecks of the folks who use their equipment.
[**Help us give Montana farmers a genuine advocate in Congress who will fight for their business and right to repair: chip in $10 or whatever you can to support Laurie and send her to Washington next year.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510024/311390872/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013rtr_bfm_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWY0OGZjYy02NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eTNtj1N-Ab1bjSo-GQnATVE6LpnA7qy185qMAQSFJ2s=)

clean_body: | = Friend, Laurie is a former small business owner, and like any small business owner, she knows that when something needs fixing, you need it fixed quickly. The same goes for farmers — when their equipment breaks down, every day they have to wait to get it fixed means less money in their pocket. Right to repair is the simple idea that manufacturers should sell the tools farmers need to quickly and efficiently repair their own equipment when it breaks down. Sounds simple, right? Unfortunately, farmers are forced to work under anti-competitive monopolies that have been created from the immense consolidation of the manufacturing industry. These massive companies that make and sell products would rather require farmers to pay out the nose for repairs, or even buy new equipment entirely, than give them the ability to fix it themselves. The bottom line: our farmers struggle while corporations profit. While Republican Ryan Zinke will try to convince you he supports Montana’s farmers, the truth is he opposes right to repair and efforts to help family farms make ends meet. | = How do we know? Because at a wine-and-dine industry event that opposes right to repair. Laurie stands with Montana farmers. As a state legislator, she has consistently voted in favor of policies that would make it easier for farmers to repair their own equipment and continue making a living without paying an arm and a leg to large manufacturers who are more concerned with their bottom line than the paychecks of the folks who use their equipment. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ****** | **** | = = **** | = = **** | = = This is yet another example of Zinke saying one thing to win Montanans’ votes, but then turning around and catering to big business and throwing our best interests to the wind. We can’t trust him to serve us in Congress, and with enough grassroots support from people like you, we can beat him less than 13 months from now. Thanks, Team Bishop | Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana Laurie Bishop for Montana PO Box 2188 Livingston, MT 59047 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c483%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=09Uuob9CjEvgBJPiXwW83A&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66008%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Innm3rtB2LvfNnFAWm4C%2bQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66009%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S0DlAtWphVMV5hu0DAZ0vg&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66000%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZzGEvQQZ0hckiavvtUxJ3w&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

clean_body: We’re fighting to make our cities safe again. | Friend, One year ago, the city of Kenosha BURNED while our radical liberal governor, Tony Evers, stoked the flames of division and abandoned our law enforcement here in Wisconsin. A deeply troubling pattern has taken shape across America: Democrat governors like Evers continue to neglect the safety of their citizens in favor of the Left’s “woke” agenda. I’m running for governor to restore law and order and ensure our men and women in blue have the support they need to keep us SAFE. But first, I need YOUR help to retire weak Tony Evers who continues to put you LAST. Your safety will always be my number one priority as governor. But the policies of the Biden-Harris administration -- and their liberal puppet governors -- have led to record highs of violent crime all across our major cities. We cannot stand for this. You have my word, Friend -- unlike Tony Evers, I will NEVER turn my back on the men and women in blue who risk their lives every day to keep us safe. But to send Evers packing and restore law and order to our streets, I’m counting on your sustained support. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf5f9ldtppm0h9324o7avq3o7ev76jt85nd9qpb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chim1o74c3h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zo7ulgpp23ht61lr5lg7sfj7fgk64ir2drcqenhg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chim1o74c3h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjo1url6rp22aq7jml0o9egh35ch8crpgd3bsik8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chim1o74c3h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqs2ll0nfojlo6gqfvn31pkvrdojipvuk1gac7e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chim1o74c3h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zj8ft5j0shkg3cmvt1fqffaivfohgjjgdut669u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chim1o74c3h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zs53eh9ifh58u9nn196bleljnr2kfmm3eve2bmcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1chim1o74c3h2bs) Thank you for your support! Dear Friend,

Did you know that Joe Biden is proposing a financial spying operation that would impact nearly every American?

Buried deep in Biden’s $5.5 TRILLION tax-and-spend plan is a proposal that **would require the IRS to review every bank account that has above a $600 balance.**

So long story short: the Biden Administration wants to take a peek at your checking account.

Not only is this a threat to taxpayer privacy, but also it could lead politicians **and unelected bureaucrats to eventually find a way to control how you save and spend your own money.**

It is truly a threat to our freedom.

What do you think?

clean_body: Did you know that Joe Biden is proposing a financial spying operation that would impact nearly every American? | Dear Friend, Did you know that Joe Biden is proposing a financial spying operation that would impact nearly every American? Buried deep in Biden’s $5.5 TRILLION tax-and-spend plan is a proposal that would require the IRS to review every bank account that has above a $600 balance. So long story short: the Biden Administration wants to take a peek at your checking account. Not only is this a threat to taxpayer privacy, but also it could lead politicians and unelected bureaucrats to eventually find a way to control how you save and spend your own money. It is truly a threat to our freedom. What do you think? Do you think the IRS should be allowed to review your bank account? Do you support Joe Biden’s $5.5 TRILLION tax-and-spend plan? Thank you in advance for your participation. Your answer is confidential and will help Club for Growth better understand where the conservative grassroots stands on this important issue. Sincerely, David McIntosh President, Club for Growth CLUB FOR GROWTH 202.955.5500 Our mailing address is: 2001 L Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20036

body:

It wasn’t an easy one for him to write, but it’s important. Every week, it feels like there’s a new mass shooting or gun violence incident. And every time it happens, Republicans like Bill Lee offer up their “thoughts and prayers” with no thought or effort as to how we might actually prevent further tragedies. The answer is incredibly simple: **We need common-sense gun safety laws, and we needed them yesterday.** But just as he’s shown in every other area that matters, Gov. Lee is clearly not up to the task. In fact, earlier this year he signed a permitless carry bill into law, yet another example of his extreme, out-of-touch tendencies. **Dr. Martin — a gun owner himself — is ready to do what it takes to make Tennessee safe from rampant gun violence. [_Take a look at his note below and contribute to help us elect a leader with courage to the governorship._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510946/311394631/862036749?refcode2=6f7ba4b5-692c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013gunviolence2_TM_op_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjdiYTRiNS02OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu-pm5uI59W7Wrq6Oyw1-pr-bpjklese81IivnkaGx0=) ** | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510947/311394632/-103157484?refcode2=6f7ba4b5-692c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013gunviolence2_TM_op_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjdiYTRiNS02OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu-pm5uI59W7Wrq6Oyw1-pr-bpjklese81IivnkaGx0=)

From: Dr. Jason Martin
Date: October 11, 2021
Subject: Tennessee’s other public health crisis
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510948/311394633/862036749?refcode2=6f7ba4b5-692c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013gunviolence2_TM_op_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjdiYTRiNS02OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu-pm5uI59W7Wrq6Oyw1-pr-bpjklese81IivnkaGx0=)
---
Hey Peter.
Here in Tennessee, COVID-19 isn’t the only pervasive danger to public health.
We have an epidemic of gun violence.
Just last week, children — _children_ — were placed in harm's way when a student brought a gun to the Cummings K-8 school in South Memphis and opened fire. Luckily and by the grace of God, no one was killed. One student was injured, and they’re expected to make a full recovery
But the chief medical officer at the LeBonheur Children’s Hospital, where the injured student was treated, said that this was only one of the more than one hundred children that have been treated for gunshot wounds this year.
**That is appalling. And worse, Governor Bill Lee refuses to do anything about it.[_I’m running for governor because we have got to protect Tennesseans — especially our children — from gun violence. Will you make a contribution now to help me address the gun violence epidemic in our state?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510949/311394634/862036749?refcode2=6f7ba4b5-692c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013gunviolence2_TM_op_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjdiYTRiNS02OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu-pm5uI59W7Wrq6Oyw1-pr-bpjklese81IivnkaGx0=)**
If I'm being completely honest, this is a tough topic for me to fundraise around. But then I think about my three daughters; I think about the fact that **Bill Lee signed a permitless carry bill into law earlier this year** ; I think about the devastation that some families have already experienced as a result of Lee’s callousness, and I know that I have to do everything I can to make sure that no one else goes through that.
**Here’s the truth:** Platitudes are not enough. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. Business as usual is absolutely not enough. It has to change and we have to do better.
**Tennesseans in every corner of the state are counting on this campaign to deliver real action to save lives.**
That’s why I’m still asking for your support and donations here: I don’t see any other choice. We have to get Bill Lee out of the governorship, and elect someone who will lead with compassion, empathy, and courage. [_**If you contribute just $5 now, you’ll be helping us achieve that vision of a Tennessee where everyone thrives and no one lives in fear.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37510950/311394635/862036749?refcode2=6f7ba4b5-692c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=fl_email_fr_20211013gunviolence2_TM_op_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjdiYTRiNS02OTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu-pm5uI59W7Wrq6Oyw1-pr-bpjklese81IivnkaGx0=)

body:
Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf62821e19814085843fda94b9f7a3f9&_e=9QUNzXx8bWr3TR4EYg7vlDGxcRYgdmECcpeb9RTv2VFZcufQIdoNqQ3TsaeHlIGvdKRlgxn3vGUfdZaO5xngzvGzk5DYOmIcgJxvEVBi1GaqJPA_fgBFaM1UE2RUpgExsJs85J5T0NqNbm90aUETlH02Xo8ETolgLf4yToK5nH93m7xZz49BR6FmW5pTqKmmEB7liYqEolzKC6MxZSO3whQQNYoLOuK0LnGBbhiL2LPGPux6Gpgj0NhxERwVu0OP-CfuyKMm2OIGFcn3b8PaWTHKMvJuYt5haoolyXhoD2TUI3V3L88wE9fEHDDgGnKF-x0rUaY9pB0lPLLCkqnyqo7w5L5f2-oRlhU0QT6OXDWhPeQ9Vq2CLAiZltQK1Q75w7n4WrnKDXGiJ2RwwInGBaE2RzCI_NfxjegvobebLy46B9M2oWofnATaBCLKOeBsbHqkcNGwRVKwFMYo-slomA%3D%3D)

Peter,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cf62821e19814085843fda94b9f7a3f9&_e=9QUNzXx8bWr3TR4EYg7vlDGxcRYgdmECcpeb9RTv2VFZcufQIdoNqQ3TsaeHlIGvdKRlgxn3vGUfdZaO5xngzvGzk5DYOmIcgJxvEVBi1GaqJPA_fgBFaM1UE2RUpgExsJs85J5T0NqNbm90aUETlH02Xo8ETolgLf4yToK5nH93m7xZz49BR6FmW5pTqKmmEB7liYqEolzKC6MxZSO3whQQNYoLOuK0LnGBbhiL2LPGPux6Gpgj0NhxERwVu0OPeEpZKudN0_Hgz6OSdooo7svPJUbeGGgjXmPQmD67HUiPDMUs6ESPtjbKlyDE6zbCVBa2TC1V54S60rQUKzGNTSbfp1fEWDMYhXhAynuy1fHgwVus3d_SJJWXubyIld8RtbvGO4aeVcr1KWqqT3DgUdhCp_jix60Yu_wexvLH219mhz8rDwG4aumomL1XpJ9bPBNF48B8ui7u4_rILjaZZg%3D%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

name: Team Padilla
subject: Facing a bit of a problem this month
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
we rely on lots of individual, small-dollar contributions in response to emails like this one to power our campaign
#

As you know, we rely on lots of individual, small-dollar contributions in response to emails like this one to power our campaign. But we’re facing a bit of a problem this month, and we’re hoping you can help.
**Here’s the situation:** In October, our average donation in response to emails like this one is down 28% from September. Because of that, we’re a little bit behind where we’d hoped to be in order to hit our fundraising goals for the month.
So we have two options for how to proceed:
1. Either we need more individual contributions.
2. Or we need folks like you to donate slightly larger amounts.

Normally, we ask first-time donors to our campaign to give $5 or $10. But if you could chip in $20 today, it would go a long way toward closing the gap and bringing us back to where we need to be for the month.
**It’s so important we have the resources to defend this seat and keep Alex in the Senate, so we have to ask:**
[**Can you make a $20 contribution to our people-powered campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-15&t=1&refcode2=392_159979_mzRKF5&akid=392%2E159979%2EmzRKF5)
**[DONATE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211013-1-15&t=2&refcode2=392_159979_mzRKF5&akid=392%2E159979%2EmzRKF5)**
Every contribution makes our movement stronger, so thank you for chipping in today and being a part of this people-powered movement.
Your support means the world to Alex and to all of us.
\- Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=392%2E159979%2EmzRKF5)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I'm gonna lose my damn voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XgkpFIluA9JkbOdqhE1hth50h-SC1w4EkznIgootgRZlGf4Q9502f_Ba0TIpJAHANxUnQQ0QhfLZNlvTw2w7XrMbqKC6917rPUVNz9rh4OiM8FLXBvRc3f0zZ8tPwNu6zVDpMvC-ME_-J1lQ32OCOuGOAxz2qwSruRZXFTOAAN2KVWxzSIgfWmixAkE5H9R-MM4QSoaoeo178eU590CVnhC6XKedgjMRc3RWzGzn6OWQRiMqTOy6zQiJFRW1ElXgjWfnZ00DMKkWfEZvLF5rJX01TL3czO5XeYKt1VfLtjrp/3g4/5PwK9xE1SUO-Wqnww8daKQ/h0/dqo89ABEjvX11cw9h4qRG1-BbmmDuVLoH1LvGzIarmY)
Derek, I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.

[**Our fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting big things done for the American people. So Derek, will you split a few bucks between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical goal before the clock runs out?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XgkpFIluA9JkbOdqhE1hth6i1Ijlqe2wSB53noWIpBHYN-x3526p7rVSX1esGrdHJBlcBidlpVojywn3ezh7320bnNOJ8n_H9qdUsljJMq5A5BqyeLkLd1C7nNWwHM6aPNNZh_biBdpM4X5l-XLzNyCCLQ1iTvGPqn_qexxz_NbaFe4HGIkBrRaE64v_fnG3ZuwaTaTA4JLFY5FJbjriNU1H4KDxIBhauwQWZ1DEMqHCy7CfasXoM4UzBr1OnAMs5mLH-aQjxdYB0KnYIPg4gEzpGG3gSatDh_wCi2J3RqzA/3g4/5PwK9xE1SUO-Wqnww8daKQ/h1/uhCWxvXWLqT1p-23pJk__614sNWoC-ucRo3kxTvb9dU) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XgkpFIluA9JkbOdqhE1hth5vwREezhb6oKG-KsoyXH7vW9XpCsFOQO7sQt90RfRB9qpfNhuRjocPTWOksXEU9BGYF1U9Hh-SLPEQ3tQPoIKCmDXfCv0LizO67g-3cQgLXOr_Gdynx1DMEa9mG0fK39Lrz-HGwd6kJ7IQG-5dnVgVv6O2ExN66MztGVhz419oHDd81p_zThHAdYaHirSJyEWcVHhWdzyTDujX7Hp14AjUqd6CPn6ynwicOHwErl2tTuh0swGhmOWeekeDwvTm2Tkl0wh_7D8c5m73tDd-0F-s/3g4/5PwK9xE1SUO-Wqnww8daKQ/h2/jU-TCyuI7rnaGuGqwMxnVU3mcHZ-Blawi2VwjaOfe4Q)

name: Team Malcolm
subject: Malcolm’s Democratic opponent loaned their campaign $500,000 last quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We’re asking you to donate to a real working-class person running for U.S. Senate
#

**$1,028,000**
That’s how much money one of Malcolm’s Democratic opponents reported raising last quarter.
**$500,000**
That’s how much that same opponent loaned their campaign last quarter. $500,000 of their own cash.
**$3**
That’s how much we’re asking you to donate to a real working-class person running for U.S. Senate.
Malcolm Kenyatta will be a champion for working folks in Pennsylvania and across the country, but he can’t afford to self-fund.
We know $3 may not seem like the kind of money that can compete with our opponent's self-funding, but by the time you read this sentence, someone has already chipped in $5.
**Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Because that's how we're going to win this race — together.**
[So we have to ask: Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign to elect Malcolm Kenyatta today? We're counting on an overwhelming number of small-dollar donations from working people to win this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37511860/311398853/-360183459?refcode2=25ee92a7-6e2c-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211013-1-30-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWVlOTJhNy02ZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t446J2KQfqoisc2rs0MYn3k7o6u9ijyRxN4cTARt67E=)

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: Reproductive rights are depending on us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 |
body:
Team,

Right now, the fate of Roe v. Wade is in the dark, even with the recent Federal Court ruling, and protecting a woman’s right to choose her own healthcare is now up to us. We need our top supporters to step up in opposition to anti-choice Congressman Scott Perry and protect reproductive rights. Will you rush a donation of $10 now? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211013roe_N_TE_90D_5_NG_N_L1

Scott Perry is determined to use his power to meddle in our personal health decisions and tell women what they can, and can’t do with their own bodies. No matter your political stripe, we all agree that the choices we make about our health should stay between us, our families, and our doctors -- and no one else.

Scott Perry thinks differently. He believes he gets to impose his values on all Central Pennsylvanians and works to chip away at our rights vote by vote. It’s up to us to flip this seat, and kick the most vulnerable extremist out of public office.

No matter what happens at the Supreme Court, we need to be prepared for the worse. And if it comes, we need a leader we can and will make sure that women’s reproductive health will always be protected at the federal level.

Will you do your part to take back our healthcare from Scott Perry’s hands by chipping in $21 today? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211013roe_N_TE_90D_5_NG_N_L2&amount=21

Thank you,

-- Eugene

Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Will you pitch in any amount to help us elect a real leader to represent PA-10?

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211013roe_N_TE_90D_5_NG_N_PT]
---------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 |
---------------------------------------------

DePasquale for PA 10
P.O. Box 1822
York, PA 17405
United States
