body:
The children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer will be left to foot the bill for Democrats' outrageous spending This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. |
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec12302c5ae84cc9b3b4a1a01b85f3c1&_e=y_I2EKkjhgXVp82P70lBqIXqOLhErPNsa5JGMxSV8Zfq2hyP6lFf8joQJ7SjTQ3YLMso9brhQjHzZ87ekStUjEvzE-_zK-pXI8gy_ckPECNB5jzDdqOVLEVC9O1ABFa1vaFkEM6_1pqmPru8Mc89jg9o4itmQ8u9z-ey9scyljdywTNp9HxnyeFgca6oUg1_XzW3Oa6XeZGFMn5mNUqjFnu4kxzn2ItUV-I_xnqO4ZAQX5efO_-FuizE-uqqARNyNngGNYjpdCyZPYn-K3sYX722AUqJGPO2bhXO--vWqDdmiLE2PV_LsVw0zF5y_AC9bXbBlKeMeuKqXB6Y9pdBTEABH02bQ_LT1h8IDPVnkxbdBIZ1eQvdQYYFuGT21_kVLBcHbIjBRYTzsz9MnQzUPYHdPYnLbJo2Bzqvt2DhzC2O6vR6dbLpTxqwC9c8xDUTOzIGKSeCBh_rRwPyBBRZeg5t-K3aFeG6dRWgyG9ftho%3D) Fellow Conservative,

My phone’s ringing off the hook with moms from all over the country concerned about the state of our nation and the impact of Joe Biden and the Democrats’ socialist policies on our children’s futures.

**With the Democrats spending trillions on their liberal wish list, the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer will be left to foot the bill.** _This is not how Washington should work._

Americans do not go to work each day to earn money so career politicians can spend it on pork projects. [**And we shouldn’t sit back as Democrats raise the debt ceiling, propose exorbitant taxes and regulations just to secure their socialist agenda.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec12302c5ae84cc9b3b4a1a01b85f3c1&_e=y_I2EKkjhgXVp82P70lBqIXqOLhErPNsa5JGMxSV8Zfq2hyP6lFf8joQJ7SjTQ3YLMso9brhQjHzZ87ekStUjEvzE-_zK-pXI8gy_ckPECNB5jzDdqOVLEVC9O1ABFa1vaFkEM6_1pqmPru8Mc89jg9o4itmQ8u9z-ey9scyljdywTNp9HxnyeFgca6oUg1_XzW3Oa6XeZGFMn5mNUqjFnu4kxzn2ItUV-I_xnqO4ZAQX5efO_-FuizE-uqqARNy2HHbqRPpIczlaOpuI9FDgBaqF9b9NPOHdVtRSRjmy528UzqRSXh5BIVKLPAUE9VpsNl_N-00At1rwCNtKb1PI2w1cpuvHHufyV9WzEyXOAaSannUdhRpPdTZ-2yC1Eo_NVP7G937jzIQEScXrt_6UePUNFruV4gCHLTCKIBjd_tiDZS9b0-_kjXjs8c5b_62bUoFTHWbyfo63X9aKV8JM8P3i56FatZ6_DToopPySE8%3D)

Right now, we are facing an uphill battle. If we want to get our economy back on track and protect our children, we have to rein in out-of-control spending. [**I know that when I get to Washington, I will fight tooth and nail for fiscal responsibility and for our children’s futures**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec12302c5ae84cc9b3b4a1a01b85f3c1&_e=y_I2EKkjhgXVp82P70lBqIXqOLhErPNsa5JGMxSV8Zfq2hyP6lFf8joQJ7SjTQ3YLMso9brhQjHzZ87ekStUjEvzE-_zK-pXI8gy_ckPECNB5jzDdqOVLEVC9O1ABFa1vaFkEM6_1pqmPru8Mc89jg9o4itmQ8u9z-ey9scyljdywTNp9HxnyeFgca6oUg1_XzW3Oa6XeZGFMn5mNUqjFnu4kxzn2ItUV-I_xnqO4ZAQX5efO_-FuizE-uqqARNymotqrkz6_c-Yt9kchgpD4H0VkD-loPIbh3Mb-aeRJbZ1dpn8weUxnXk_ITdsSuiZpXcF5TFTkaKahkqkkEkl1j02KjqDWvWQ1sJqdqDBOvNsEUhy9vqvTXIcy5dwtkqiRxPjvZQQEpreVZ5DSDqRa91s_HJ6-Ipytas5qMDAAlv6wUa0gf-hJs9mdfrDMDkie-bLtr_uBR1b8bn6K38hqaob-Nr14-goBsPfFgCsSIo%3D) \- _but I need your help to get there._

[**Will you please consider pitching in just $10, $15, $25 or even $50 to my campaign immediately so we have the resources we need to restore common-sense conservative leadership to the House?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec12302c5ae84cc9b3b4a1a01b85f3c1&_e=y_I2EKkjhgXVp82P70lBqIXqOLhErPNsa5JGMxSV8Zfq2hyP6lFf8joQJ7SjTQ3YLMso9brhQjHzZ87ekStUjEvzE-_zK-pXI8gy_ckPECNB5jzDdqOVLEVC9O1ABFa1vaFkEM6_1pqmPru8Mc89jg9o4itmQ8u9z-ey9scyljdywTNp9HxnyeFgca6oUg1_XzW3Oa6XeZGFMn5mNUqjFnu4kxzn2ItUV-I_xnqO4ZAQX5efO_-FuizE-uqqARNyLNBQfStdeAUebuNqDF0VS7jcv35-lMjj6TjtQUIs8yp4_qUHwyvbMqsF4ojV8w69AZwkGxRHdbVmYs7tMyxo6DdIlrxPuvaIsYnt0SJVLj-QHR9ohG2k4r55E1uM3XWa1L9-Zu2KYEgqLv3pqoOPmmaYc8QVOtooe8h6HhzA96FPWDBqqyhMdUGFZeiOJRsIXGFeEutrxYDvvMKDGn-GL_oGt84GJmc0k4gKZO6Ye7I%3D)

[ SEND A CONSERVATIVE MOM

Peter, many of Joe Biden's problems are caused by impotence and incompetence. But not the border crisis. This attack on our sovereignty is by design.

name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Teachers' unions are out of control
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8808%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=g6nmLh1US4we86lqGCTzLA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15193%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wOYMqw90IKuON1%2bKlGPpuA&sysid=1) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news - recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children! ** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees - including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15194%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=79d5bmJlGi9UxrOYI75%2bJA&sysid=1) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15105%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7Z3%2bzBr%2fFoYPi%2foQq8KcJg&sysid=1) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15106%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iCuH30JK9OMQls2gA%2fc4Tg&sysid=1) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8808%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=g6nmLh1US4we86lqGCTzLA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8808%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=g6nmLh1US4we86lqGCTzLA&sysid=1)

Peter,

Last week, under Postmaster General Louis DeJoy’s leadership, the Postal Service raised prices and began slowing mail delivery to cut costs.

**DeJoy’s USPS sabotage will only hasten the privatization of our postal service, which would be disastrous for rural communities.** The USPS is a lifeline for people who rely on the Postal Service to deliver lifesaving medicines, essential supplies, and so much more.

Donna

| Peter,

Today, we here in the Lehigh Valley were thrilled to welcome first lady Dr. Jill Biden. Dr. Biden is rounding out Hispanic Heritage month by visiting Hispanic communities right here in the district.

Susan joined Dr. Biden and Secretary of Health and Human Services Xavier Becerra in a listening session for Hispanic families at a Head Start school in Allentown. The Head Start program supports early childhood education for low-income children and families.

**Education and supporting students and families are shared passions of Susan and the first lady — but if we lose control of the House in 2022, these programs could be at risk.**

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Aadland for U.S. Senate News
body:
Erik on the consequence of Democratic rule
---
| | | | | | Volume 12 | October 12, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| Our nation is growing increasingly unsafe, not only on the world stage due to the insipid weakness of the Biden administration and the failure in Afghanistan, but in our very neighborhoods. Crime is on the rise--statistics released this week by the Federal Bureau of Investigation show a 30% rise in the homicide rate in 2020.
And while Democrats blame the pandemic for every woe, what they won't tell you is that nine out of the top 10 cities for crime are Democrat led. Radical Left policies that seek to defund law enforcement are driving this wave of crime. In Austin, Texas, where they cut funding to the police, the city has asked its citizens to not call 9-1-1. As a result, crime has exploded, and the homicide rate is at an all-time high. In Minneapolis, famous for defunding the police, homicides rose 87% in the last year. The local government there in response voted to re-fund law enforcement. Unfortunately, you can't re-fund lives that were lost due to these insanely malicious and neglectful policies.
In addition, criminal elements are exploiting our porous Southern border. Illicit drug-use and distribution is on the rise. We must re-secure our Southern border immediately. Furthermore, the Department of Justice tis suffering from a crisis of leadership; we must hold it accountable in how it is failing to keep America safe by letting dangerous criminals roam free.
I stand with our law enforcement agencies. I want to end the early release of prisoners and restore teeth to the justice system. Left wing ideology is backfiring and putting our neighborhoods in peril. In a free society, law and order must be held in careful balance. We must observe the rule of law by bringing violent criminals to justice.
Meanwhile, those who faithfully fulfilled their duties during the most challenging of times, seeing us through the worst of the pandemic without a COVID-19 vaccination, should not now be mandated to receive one. To force a vaccination after the true threat has past is simply wrong.
We must take a stand against vaccine mandates. Period. If government intrusion does not stop at the boundary of our skin, where does it stop? Just this week, a member of my campaign staff told me his spouse's job is in jeopardy because she is not comfortable taking the jab. This comes after years of honest service to the employer. This is unconscionable, and I commend her for her courage. Help me stand against this blatant and tyrannical government overreach. .
Erik

| |
---|---
|
* Wednesday, Oct. 13: Park County Republican Central Committee Meeting in the Fairplay Barn at the Fairplay County Fairgrounds. Meeting starts at 7:00 PM (Erik will speak and answer questions)

* Saturday Oct. 16: Erik will be in-studio with Randy Corporon on 710 AM KNUS. Tune in to the 9 o'clock hour.

* Saturday Oct 17: Erik will speak to the Colorado Federation of Republican Women's 83rd Annual Board of Directors Meeting & Fall Convention. Embassy Suites by Hilton 10250 E. Costilla Ave Centennial CO. 9:00am-11:00am

| | |

| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
This past week I was on the Peter Boyles show, traveled south and met with the Chaffee County Patriots, spoke with the Jefferson County Men's Republican group, and appeared on the Atypical Intellects Podcast.

Tuesday, I head to the San Luis Valley to meet with Alamosa County Republicans. This Wednesday night, I'll share my vision for taking back our country with the Park County Republicans and on Saturday, I'll be on Randy Corporon's show at 9:25 a.m. on KNUS.

Once again, thank you for supporting this campaign which is dedicated to protecting the freedoms and rights of all Coloradans and Americans. Together we can stand against the tyranny of the radical Left. I can't do it alone, so anything you can do to contribute to the cause will help us drive back the extensive overreach of government, allowing each of us to make the best choices for our own lives as we see fit.

I hope to see you somewhere on the campaign trail.
| |
---
| | |
---
| Fundraising?
---
| Yes. Fundraising is far from the most enjoyable activity in which a campaign engages. But the fact is, money is crucial to reaching people with the news of Erik Aadland. Since this is a state-wide campaign, our task is to reach every single voter in Colorado. Costs to reach these folks range from printed materials to travel to advertising and much more. Aadland for U.S. Senate is a true grass-roots campaign. We don't have the advantage of a ten-figure personal fortune to get going like other campaigns which Colorado has had to endure. We count on every-day folks like you to to help with any amount they can. Please consider helping Erik secure the Republican nomination by making a donation today.
Help us save the country! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for U.S. Senate Staff

clean_body: Erik on the consequence of Democratic rule | | | | | | Volume 12 | October 12, 2021 | | A Word From Erik | Our nation is growing increasingly unsafe, not only on the world stage due to the insipid weakness of the Biden administration and the failure in Afghanistan, but in our very neighborhoods. Crime is on the rise--statistics released this week by the Federal Bureau of Investigation show a 30% rise in the homicide rate in 2020. And while Democrats blame the pandemic for every woe, what they won't tell you is that nine out of the top 10 cities for crime are Democrat led. Radical Left policies that seek to defund law enforcement are driving this wave of crime. In Austin, Texas, where they cut funding to the police, the city has asked its citizens to not call 9-1-1. As a result, crime has exploded, and the homicide rate is at an all-time high. In Minneapolis, famous for defunding the police, homicides rose 87% in the last year. The local government there in response voted to re-fund law enforcement. Unfortunately, you can't re-fund lives that were lost due to these insanely malicious and neglectful policies. In addition, criminal elements are exploiting our porous Southern border. Illicit drug-use and distribution is on the rise. We must re-secure our Southern border immediately. Furthermore, the Department of Justice tis suffering from a crisis of leadership; we must hold it accountable in how it is failing to keep America safe by letting dangerous criminals roam free. I stand with our law enforcement agencies. I want to end the early release of prisoners and restore teeth to the justice system. Left wing ideology is backfiring and putting our neighborhoods in peril. In a free society, law and order must be held in careful balance. We must observe the rule of law by bringing violent criminals to justice. Meanwhile, those who faithfully fulfilled their duties during the most challenging of times, seeing us through the worst of the pandemic without a COVID-19 vaccination, should not now be mandated to receive one. To force a vaccination after the true threat has past is simply wrong. We must take a stand against vaccine mandates. Period. If government intrusion does not stop at the boundary of our skin, where does it stop? Just this week, a member of my campaign staff told me his spouse's job is in jeopardy because she is not comfortable taking the jab. This comes after years of honest service to the employer. This is unconscionable, and I commend her for her courage. Help me stand against this blatant and tyrannical government overreach. . Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.

name: Team Patty
subject: the Senate majority is about our future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We know you get a lot of emails asking for your support.
#
Peter,
We know you get a lot of emails asking for your support. Patty is beyond grateful for each and every member of this team that is committed to keeping the Senate blue in the midterm election.
**This fight for control of the U.S. Senate is about our country’s future. We need to win it.**
Our fragile Senate majority was hard-won -- and we’ve already made progress helping families and our economy come back stronger from this public health crisis. But if Mitch McConnell and the Republicans flip the Senate red, they’ll be able to turn back the clock on all of our progress.
**We’ve got another big fundraising goal this week --_and we can’t afford to come up short._**
**[Can you rush in $5 now ahead of Patty’s critical mid-month fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37513477/311406058/137030067?refcode=pm_em_211013_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2M1NTQ5My03NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vw-r-vPUUO5ykEp3Il8uzFj1lqQNpe_pZve_OrBvxPM=)**
Peter, we need to raise another **$14,218** this week to stay on track for our October goal.
It’s going to take all of us continuing to come together and contributing small amounts to make sure we have the resources to defend this seat in Washington state and keep our Senate majority.
**[Contribute $5 or anything now to help reelect Patty Murray and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37513478/311406059/137030067?refcode=pm_em_211013_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2M1NTQ5My03NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vw-r-vPUUO5ykEp3Il8uzFj1lqQNpe_pZve_OrBvxPM=)**

Team Patty

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Running a grassroots-driven campaign is important to me. Here’s why….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
I have yet to meet a single American who believes the problem with our politics is there is not enough money in it. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37513497/311406108/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU1NzI5YS03NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuxEul1hGRl1JuLDthbavprsjb9kNcpZrTAzTFs-koQ=)
Friend, I’m the only Senator running for re-election who isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. Removing the stranglehold that these groups have on our democracy is personal. Give me a moment to explain why, then please support my grassroots-driven campaign and [_**donate to help re-elect me to the Senate before Saturday’s mid-month fundraising deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37513498/311406109/1929152467?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211013_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU1NzI5YS03NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuxEul1hGRl1JuLDthbavprsjb9kNcpZrTAzTFs-koQ=) I have yet to meet a single American who believes the problem with our politics is there is not enough money in it. Americans’ trust in politicians is low and D.C.’s reputation is in the gutter because voters can see what’s going on: Elected officials take money from corporate special interests, and that money often comes with strings. Those strings often lead to inaction in the form of tough votes never taken, bills we can’t pass despite urgent calls from constituents, and science-based evidence politicians willfully ignore. It’s frustrating to witness and it’s why I’m rejecting corporate special-interest money in favor of talking to my constituents and focusing on improving the lives of everyday Coloradans. It’s high time to tackle the influence of money in politics, and I’ve been working in the Senate to do just that. **Your trust is worth much more to me than any corporate PAC check. ** But that means we have to make up our fundraising in other ways in order to compete with Republicans who gladly accept those corporate PAC checks. Which is why I rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $20 dollars at a time in order to run my campaign the right way. It takes a lot of small-dollar donations in order to make up the difference, but that’s the power of our campaign: a huge group of supporters standing together can fight back just as hard as the large corporations or federal lobbyists. **So I’m asking you to make one of those contributions before Saturday’s mid-month fundraising deadline. Please chip in any amount — whatever makes sense for you — to my campaign today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37513499/311406110/1929152467?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211013_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU1NzI5YS03NjJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WuxEul1hGRl1JuLDthbavprsjb9kNcpZrTAzTFs-koQ=)**

clean_body: I have yet to meet a single American who believes the problem with our politics is there is not enough money in it. | = Friend, I’m the only Senator running for re-election who isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. Removing the stranglehold that these groups have on our democracy is personal. Give me a moment to explain why, then please support my grassroots-driven campaign and = I have yet to meet a single American who believes the problem with our politics is there is not enough money in it. Americans’ trust in politicians is low and D.C.’s reputation is in the gutter because voters can see what’s going on: Elected officials take money from corporate special interests, and that money often comes with strings. Those strings often lead to inaction in the form of tough votes never taken, bills we can’t pass despite urgent calls from constituents, and science-based evidence politicians willfully ignore. It’s frustrating to witness and it’s why I’m rejecting corporate special-interest money in favor of talking to my constituents and focusing on improving the lives of everyday Coloradans. It’s high time to tackle the influence of money in politics, and I’ve been working in the Senate to do just that. Your trust is worth much more to me than any corporate PAC check. But that means we have to make up our fundraising in other ways in order to compete with Republicans who gladly accept those corporate PAC checks. Which is why I rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $20 dollars at a time in order to run my campaign the right way. It takes a lot of small-dollar donations in order to make up the difference, but that’s the power of our campaign: a huge group of supporters standing together can fight back just as hard as the large corporations or federal lobbyists. So I’m asking you to make one of those contributions before Saturday’s mid-month fundraising deadline. Please chip in any amount — whatever makes sense for you — to my campaign today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = It’s an honor to work for you and with you. Thanks for being on this team, — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: From Rio de Janeiro to Braddock, with love! ❤️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Just before my eighth birthday, my mother came home with a suitcase and told me to pack my favorite things.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211013-3001-header&t=1&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
Hey, Peter — it's Gisele Barreto Fetterman!
I wanted to send you a quick message to ask if you'd be able to [** _send $5 our way to support my husband Joao's campaign for Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32855?refcode=em20211013-3001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
If you're in a hurry and are in a position to chip in, then we'd both be so deeply grateful for your support. **But, if you have a bit longer to spare today, I was hoping I could take a moment to share a piece of my story with you.**
With Hispanic Heritage Month coming to a close at the end of this week, I've been thinking a lot about my heritage + my journey immigrating to the U.S. Just before my eighth birthday, my mother came home with a suitcase and told me to pack my favorite things. She said we were going on an adventure. My mother decided that the violence surrounding us in Rio de Janeiro was too frequent and normalized for us to stay, so we left in search of hope and opportunity.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32855?refcode=em20211013-3001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
_The happiest memories back in Brazil with my late grandmother, Bibi_
My mother knew she wanted to give us a better, safer life. But it meant leaving behind our whole world — our family, our friends, our home. We moved to the U.S., a new country where we knew no one and didn’t speak the language.
Like so many undocumented immigrants, we were forced to live in the shadows, constantly looking over our shoulders. We worked hard and kept our heads low.
**But having to remain invisible for over a decade often made me feel like we did not belong. I soon realized this feeling was shared by many other immigrants and underrepresented groups.**
Still, we were so happy and grateful to be here. We quickly fell in love with our new home and community. My mother never once looked back. She was an American from the day she got off the plane.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32855?refcode=em20211013-3001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
_In New York shortly after my family and I arrived in the U.S._
One night, we came across a curb that was covered in furniture — couches, beds, dressers — all of it perfect in my eyes, but abandoned. When I found out the furniture had been put there to be picked up by a truck, crushed, and thrown away, I was shocked — especially since we had no furniture. We had just come from a country with such poverty, where so many people had so little. My eight-year-old brain could not understand why we were destroying things that were perfect.
My family found value in these items that others deemed garbage. We ended up furnishing our first apartment with found furniture from our neighborhood. This moment sparked my lifelong pursuit to reduce waste, fight food insecurity, and find the beauty in things others have discarded.
**As an immigrant, you have a different perspective.** It’s a mindset that extends, by necessity, beyond objects. Because it’s not just things that are discarded and disregarded; there are many people who feel they have been too.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32855?refcode=em20211013-3001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
_Rio ❤️_
It is my life's honor to be the first-ever Latina to serve as the Second Lady of Pennsylvania. Yet to this day I receive hate mail — even more than my husband, an actual politician! The vast majority of this hate mail refers explicitly to my immigration history. Just last year, I was accosted in a grocery store by a woman who hurled racist slurs at me and told me I did not belong in America.
**In spite of those occasional tough moments, I wouldn't trade my experience being a formerly undocumented immigrant for anything. My story makes me who I am.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32855?refcode=em20211013-3001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
_Family ❤️_
Fun fact: Did you know in Brazil we speak Portuguese and not Spanish?
Thank you for reading all of that! I'm so thankful for the outpouring of love and support from people like you.
By now, you probably know that asking for donations on behalf of Joao's campaign does NOT come naturally to me. I always feel so awkward!!! So trust me when I tell you that I wouldn't be asking for your support if it weren't so deeply crucial to the future of our campaign. [** _But if you can spare $5 or any amount at all today, it'd make such a difference. And we couldn't be more grateful._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32855?refcode=em20211013-3001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
**[Contribute](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32855?refcode=em20211013-3001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)**
All my love,
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
Second Lady of Pennsylvania (SLOP)
P.S. Earlier this month, I had the pleasure of talking to BeLatina magazine about my experience as a Latina immigrating to the U.S. You can read the full article by [** _clicking here!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32856?t=9&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211013-3001-footer&t=10&refcode2=3001_434096_R6Rx4O&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=11&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3001%2E434096%2ER6Rx4O)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: Reminder: Rally tonight!
body:
Join me at Promontory Point fire pits at 6:30pm. | | | **Join us for a rally**
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/649c06b1777a/reminder-rally-tonight?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
# Join me tonight
This month, we are talking about police reform, and tonight's event is the first of two that will talk about this. I will be joined by members of our community at **6:30pm at the Promontory Point fire** pits to talk about Chicago's consent decree and why I believe it should burn. For me, this is more than just policy, it's personal. I hope you will join me and share your stories and experiences.
Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole

name: Warnock, Raphael
subject: If we lose in Nevada or Georgia, we'll lose the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate Contributions or gifts to Catherine Cortez Masto for Senate are not tax deductible
body:
CNN is calling me and Catherine two of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Exclusive: Counterfeiters Beware!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You won't believe this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b2adff24d8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

What a whirlwind. The last week has taken me around the country to fight for election integrity and spread it nationwide.

I just wrapped up in Iowa where I spoke at the _Save America Rally_ with President Donald Trump, fighting for our need for a 50-state audit, an audit of Pima county, and also for my Ballot Integrity Project!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=348b04e723&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _“What a job he’s done – Mark, great job, Mark! You’re going to win big, Mark!” – President Trump_
The rally was a great chance to see thousands of proud Patriots united, standing against the tyranny of the Left and for President Donald Trump!

**I am proud to have been invited to speak and endorsed by the President. We are making a great team heading into 2022. And yes – the President was right, we will win BIG! **

_In the middle of the rally, he gave me a HUGE shoutout to the work that I and my campaign have been doing. I am deeply honored that he would be so confident in our victory._

**He said this in front of the thousands in attendance and the over 100,000 people watching because he knew as a matter of a fact that I am the patriot who will continue the good fight in Arizona for election integrity and as Secretary of State!**

_[But only with continued support from Patriots like you. Can you stand with President Trump and help my campaign for Secretary of State with a donation of $25, $100, $250, $500, or more today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=72c631ddb3&e=44b8c466b0)_
**_Taking the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a7b8552be2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This last, Wednesday, I assembled a group of over 30 patriots, election officials, election integrity activists, and technology experts in Dallas Texas to take my Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National by meeting with the company _Authentix_ to discuss how we can make our ballots more secure.

_Authentix_ is amazing at what they do. They are international authenticators, authenticating currencies, pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, and tax stamps.

**They are good at what they do. **This is why I sought them out to work with me to develop significant countermeasures to ensure the sanctity of the ballot.
Working in tandem with me, they took on an innovative, never-been-done project, for the good of America!

_Human Events_ reports:

_When asked how he got the idea to initially launch the BIP, Finchem said, “Back between September and November of last year there were rumors circulating that somehow ballots had been secretly watermarked. Those rumors were not true. But it got me to thinking, what if they could be?”_

_That question ultimately led to him being introduced to the Chief Sales & Marketing Officer of Authentix, Kent Mansfield. “At first I didn’t know what to think when I got the request,” said Mansfield. “We had never done a project exactly like this, but I also knew Mark was serious about making this happen. Without any spec’s, this was an open opportunity for our people to create. I worked with our teams to design a concept and once we had it, it took about thirty days to produce a prototype.”_

**And, man, did they take this project seriously. We now have the technology to actually make it impossible for anyone to commit fraud with these ballots. And if the results of the Maricopa Audit prove anything, we need those ballots now more than ever.**

_Human Events_ continues:

_When asked about the potential problem of steering people toward paper ballots in a nation obsessed with the bells and whistles of digital security, Mansfield says,” We get that question all the time. It is often the case that a newer technology comes along that can be deployed that simply wasn’t available at the time that the last technology was deployed. This is brand new technology. It is a way to serialize documents. It can let people know that the document that left is the actual document that came back.” This lets people track and interact with their ballot and the government can know it is a legitimate ballot.”_

---
|
---
| Folks, this is going to go national if we continue our momentum in our fight for Election Integrity.

_I had seven different states approach me who are interested in getting started on this, and 38 more that are interested in learning more. This is huge. This level of interest is why I led this meeting in Dallas over this last Wednesday._
**_The Fight Continues At Home_**
[And while I continue to push for a nationwide audit and educate other patriots about what they can and _should_ do in their home states, the fight must continue at home.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=faddfe4be8&e=44b8c466b0)

In addition to auditing Pima County, the second largest County in Arizona, we must continue to push for these _Authentix_ ballots in Arizona.

**To do this, what is important to know is that money _is_ earmarked for these new ballots, but we need to get our process legislatively approved. With a narrow majority in the House and Senate, we need all the help that we can get to push this through.**

We need to Audit Pima. We need to push hard and expand our grassroots effort to ensure that the Ballot Integrity Process I pioneered gets final approval. Only then can we begin to have safe elections.

[**_Please help us audit Pima and get our Ballot Integrity Process into law with a generous donation today!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1ba443d72c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=94b1979628&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2ea60341f0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9f980e80b8&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=f203371fe5) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=f203371fe5).
---

Peter,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

body:
| Over 700,000 Americans live under taxation without federal representation.

Fellow American,

No matter what Washington Democrats say, the truth is that our Southern Border is in a crisis.

**The Biden Administration is completely inept when dealing with our Southern Border.** When they were sworn into power they made a conscious decision to dismantle President Trump's policies not because the policies were bad, but because they did not like President Trump.

If you ask me, this is pure insanity. _**President Trump's Border policies worked and should have never been dissolved, but the Biden Administration refused to put politics aside and secure our Southern Border.**_ I am sure I am not alone in feeling disgusted with this administration's actions. That's why I am reaching out to strong patriots like you.

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Rand Paul doesn’t want you to open this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we’re
halfway through October already which means two things:

1. Charles’ birthday is a week away 👀
2. And secondly, this means our campaign needs to at least meet the
halfway point of our fundraising goal for the month.

Especially after news came out that Rand Paul raised more than $4 million
from corporate PACs and wealthy donors last quarter — it’s clear that Rand
is gearing up for a fight. He knows that our people-powered movement is on
the rise and is already preparing to drown us out with dark money.

We’re not letting that happen,
Peter. If we continue working
together, this movement has the power to move mountains, but it’s going to
take everyone chipping in to power our grassroots organizing strategy this
election.

$4 million might sound like a lot of money, but remember: There’s a whole
lot of us.

There’s a people-powered movement rising up from the hood to the holler
here in Kentucky that’s ready to fight and send Charles to the U.S.
Senate. From electing our first Democratic governor in years, to Charles’
historic campaign last year — it’s clear that Kentuckians are hungry for
change.

We have supporters from all across the country who understand that if we
want to start passing impactful, people-first policies in D.C. — we need
to elect more Senators like Charles who understand firsthand the struggles
working families in our country face.

The tides are turning and we have a real chance to defeat Rand Paul this
election. But because Rand is relying on corporate donors, it’s going to
take all of us working together and chipping in what we can to catch up
and compete.

So we have to ask: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11222?refcode=em20211013-1059&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1059%2E346206%2EkuxRxp ]Do you have $4 you can spare for our
campaign,
Peter? It’s going to take $4
donations from a whole lot of us to build this grassroots movement and
usher in bold progressive leadership to Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11222?refcode=em20211013-1059&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1059%2E346206%2EkuxRxp ]Contribute $4

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211013-1059-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1059_346206_kuxRxp&akid=1059%2E346206%2EkuxRxp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1059%2E346206%2EkuxRxp

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Marco Lopez
subject: the most competitive race in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37514856/311411087/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk255-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTI2NWMyZS03ZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehE2jzjXtPUSF0O71NIKSOqMDo1OXphWKEA1jc_a9Qs=)
---
Friend, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to our people-powered campaign to flip Arizona blue. But first, let me explain why it's so crucial that you **[chip in before our major mid-month deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37514857/311411088/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk255-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTI2NWMyZS03ZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehE2jzjXtPUSF0O71NIKSOqMDo1OXphWKEA1jc_a9Qs=)** – and what's at stake if we fall short.
My story is the story of Arizona: My parents, like so many before them, immigrated to America to seek a better life for our family. They taught my siblings and me that if you work hard and have a vision, anything is possible.
When my parents came here, I know they weren’t dreaming of sending their children to the 49th-best schools or the 45th-best health care system. No family is aiming for that. But that’s where failed Republican leadership from Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward has left our state – and it's the same path we'll continue dragging our state down if we elect another GOP extremist like Kari Lake as governor.
But believing in a better future doesn't guarantee one – we have to go out and fight for it. And right now, the fight is getting tougher by the minute. **POLITICO is calling our race the most competitive open-seat race in the country, and new polls show Trump's handpicked candidate, Kari Lake (R), taking an early lead. That's why I need your help right now.**
**I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona and defeat GOP extremism from failed leaders like Ducey and Lake, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So with our major mid-month deadline almost here, this is when I need you most:** **[Please, rush $5 or more by midnight to hit our mid-month goal and defeat the GOP extremism holding Arizona back!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37514859/311411090/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk255-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTI2NWMyZS03ZTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehE2jzjXtPUSF0O71NIKSOqMDo1OXphWKEA1jc_a9Qs=)**

Partnering with Commonwealth Forward, Virginia Justice Democrats, Meet Our Moment, Jennifer Carroll Foy, Qasim Rashid, and _**everyday Virginians just like you,**_ we have reached OVER 20,000 Doors knocked! We have knocked in Chesterfield for Katie Sponsler, in Portsmouth for Nadarius Clark, in Virginia Beach for Kelly Fowler, and we are going to keep going until November 2nd. name: Max Steiner via, MaxSteinerForCongress.com
subject: $1.1 billion fighting fires.
body:
California spent more than $1.1 billion fighting wildfires this year. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37515099/311412352/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWRhYzdkNS04MDJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1izIRuuobyyBp5nq-fYiswLyoVdLN9s-3cyIcLpR6w=)
Friend,

**California spent more than $1.1 billion fighting raging wildfires this year.**

That's a staggering sum, and it underscores the importance of taking preemptive measures to prevent wildfires -- including through proper forest management. The punishing cost of doing nothing more than justifies the investment of preparing ahead.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37515100/311412353/-209993060?refcode=em-101321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWRhYzdkNS04MDJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1izIRuuobyyBp5nq-fYiswLyoVdLN9s-3cyIcLpR6w=)
_I stopped in Quincy, CA to speak with a supporter about the importance of forest management._
As Congress prepares to vote on a historic bipartisan infrastructure package, we need a representative who will ensure that our forests are viewed as critical infrastructure. Our homes, businesses, cleaning supplies, office materials, and many other daily essentials are all made from forestry products.

Smart forest management also serves as a foundation for protecting our communities against wildfires and addressing the broader climate crisis.

I'm ready to go to Congress to get to work on this important issue. It’s time that we rethink how we manage our forests. Too much is at stake to keep using this issue as another political wedge to score cheap political points.

Thanks for reading.

\- Max

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: in our own backyard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
This is just one of many major oil spills we’ve suffered, and there doesn’t seem to be an end in sight.

| | | **‘Major’ Oil Spill Off California Coast Threatens Wetlands and Wildlife**

-_New York Times_
---
Team,

Last week, our environment was hit hard. A massive oil spill off the coast of Orange County, just north of my district in San Diego, left wildlife dead and our waters polluted with an oil slick that covers 13 square miles.

This is just one of many major oil spills we’ve suffered, and there doesn’t seem to be an end in sight — unless we commit to a major overhaul of our energy system. That’s why I’m proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal.

**The stakes are clear: we need to make the switch to renewable energy, and time is running out. We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to stand up to fossil fuel giants and advocate for a livable planet for future generations.**
[_**Will you chip in to my re-election campaign today to keep a strong climate change advocate in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37515138/311412638/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211013-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODA1MTY0Mi04MTJjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDVRQO9QDve5UtQ-rAgT8iqiujDJig47_lGCqEov97E=)

clean_body: This is just one of many major oil spills we’ve suffered, and there doesn’t seem to be an end in sight. | | | ‘Major’ Oil Spill Off California Coast Threatens Wetlands and Wildlife -New York Times Team, Last week, our environment was hit hard. A massive oil spill off the coast of Orange County, just north of my district in San Diego, left wildlife dead and our waters polluted with an oil slick that covers 13 square miles. This is just one of many major oil spills we’ve suffered, and there doesn’t seem to be an end in sight — unless we commit to a major overhaul of our energy system. That’s why I’m proud to be an original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal. The stakes are clear: we need to make the switch to renewable energy, and time is running out. We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to stand up to fossil fuel giants and advocate for a livable planet for future generations. = | = I’m proud to fight for our planet in Congress, and I know I’m not alone. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Together, we can fight back against climate change. Thank you, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

clean_body: If you are, you know how important this race is | | | = | | Look, Derek, I know hitting a $500,000 goal is a tall order for any grassroots team, but after my last email flopped, I asked my team if anyone even reads these emails. If folks are reading this, they’ll know that I’m running against Glenn Youngkin, a right-wing culture warrior who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump five times — and even endorsed Trump for President in 2024! They’ll also know that The Cook Political Report recently downgraded the Virginia Governor’s race from “leans Democrat” to “toss-up.” Not to mention experts from POLITICO to The Washington Post are saying Democrats aren’t enthusiastic right now — that they’re ready to just let Trump’s handpicked candidate win. Look, Virginia fought tooth-and-nail to defeat Donald Trump, but with all that progress in jeopardy, we have to start kicking this thing into high gear. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

subject: Re: The most vulnerable Democrat

body:
Democrats are emailing supporters that the Senate seat in Georgia is the “most vulnerable Senate seat up for reelection.” |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea577b34d0104371bdf42c5db0d7e671&_e=M1kTG03yTy1dYmmAXMwM5vZnfMWxSHMxj9hEDQXI9OAkHepy7XA5zcBNwnEQYMFtp6c38vIl68YAz0YOtjPrP65ahci9XdA2AhGiDCYRq5cj6HkaKQy4l9MNrC1DVMt50hiSwnrXaSMWa0zKDWhEKTdt8xKjYzQiKC09sDX9zkbvIJRB7VkBUJztANRDyCvhubaMIt_mvr_I14uFHMDkKqLr7NrSefVp6NNJ3xIuJ2TAn_ocwqizsyBhG2EnJUOv3-Ob8zGL3AjMyUq6NLnzkC5bO9-yWgEo8sTOGfRWTT9syKvMJN2IHAGIX8pydGdalIfe6vJvOz3OqRbg6BuiytrSQDm7FfwaUavPiy2ZGbPJpKPySYSwmejxNXB0WG_nmKP06MPeh13f29xav20GEBiZVtAF6vW1jekkmzHLOuzXoCqMRjrH9ucuVKOkAg-WB4yHXfAMnqWFxp_9_cWGyA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea577b34d0104371bdf42c5db0d7e671&_e=M1kTG03yTy1dYmmAXMwM5vZnfMWxSHMxj9hEDQXI9OAkHepy7XA5zcBNwnEQYMFtp6c38vIl68YAz0YOtjPrP65ahci9XdA2AhGiDCYRq5cj6HkaKQy4l9MNrC1DVMt50hiSwnrXaSMWa0zKDWhEKTdt8xKjYzQiKC09sDX9zkbvIJRB7VkBUJztANRDyCvhubaMIt_mvr_I14uFHMDkKqLr7NrSefVp6NNJ3xIuJ2TAn_ocwqizsyBhG2EnJUOvM4lRTWxtmO-MKWVCzY_4i6uQGyVMrsVcSSYYEZjmbmtgcGR-cxV8YhxGLmpj8hM-vvl0yHOmXwy4yBoVwxq68QVa1vk1_WGnqLht2EOBsnPDXUBBzu7zlrlX935ZsPr_Y2T3HotX0YZiivx8tDy0F8hNsobI2YA31mx1LJZj00VQwTPPMHj7IHwSixzSMJk0B-YESA9TXj2uDqPb5uBKNQ%3D%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea577b34d0104371bdf42c5db0d7e671&_e=M1kTG03yTy1dYmmAXMwM5vZnfMWxSHMxj9hEDQXI9OAkHepy7XA5zcBNwnEQYMFtp6c38vIl68YAz0YOtjPrP65ahci9XdA2AhGiDCYRq5cj6HkaKQy4l9MNrC1DVMt50hiSwnrXaSMWa0zKDWhEKTdt8xKjYzQiKC09sDX9zkbvIJRB7VkBUJztANRDyCvhubaMIt_mvr_I14uFHMDkKqLr7NrSefVp6NNJ3xIuJ2TAn_ocwqizsyBhG2EnJUOvlTJEHI5p0qbXmRU_x6Pfx25YnLS2Xa55RTFWX7zy21C2YB5LZHxgGZE3aDaSuY-8ktFfkKcqClo_n2lznVrEn5joa2TfYTsXyeC2etAoRbRs6uTQSltadms2mz32iZdRu8LiPFB_vlLdOQ-yN-GqyKEmSQKA--uDyNysseuMSjisjnGkLAkBhOjORpwH8xV5ej76PxGs0XSXYbdfK804jQ%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for US Senate

[**HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THE SENATE
CHIP-IN $5**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ea577b34d0104371bdf42c5db0d7e671&_e=M1kTG03yTy1dYmmAXMwM5vZnfMWxSHMxj9hEDQXI9OAkHepy7XA5zcBNwnEQYMFtp6c38vIl68YAz0YOtjPrP65ahci9XdA2AhGiDCYRq5cj6HkaKQy4l9MNrC1DVMt50hiSwnrXaSMWa0zKDWhEKTdt8xKjYzQiKC09sDX9zkbvIJRB7VkBUJztANRDyCvhubaMIt_mvr_I14uFHMDkKqLr7NrSefVp6NNJ3xIuJ2TAn_ocwqizsyBhG2EnJUOv5ZyipWhidd2IDCI1ZT_U1CUuMo_pDwokOWR7RFP_-4CvEKOkCexXUR3B2QexcToqZ6lWnycUP2YlhVZ9SbUPSYoRASbiK0HujwdzoUfchWG-pFUh11dDp7XGlioqtYDGUt8I9GybSLWO5EUeWQi87E9SwETDVe4AvVneVV8pe0-UXXRzqXOidFYJeoeTBcbuxOhkVoTUqaqw4hME1Vewsg%3D%3D)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The one anti-choice Democrat in the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We’re trying to defeat the single most conservative Democrat in the House.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75253?refcode=em20211013-19998&t=1002&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]Can you chip in $3 now to help us unseat Henry Cuellar?

Peter,

We talk a lot about corporate Democrats — but Henry Cuellar is not only a
corporate Democrat, he also opposes abortion rights. In fact, he was the
only House Democrat to vote against protecting abortion rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75253?refcode=em20211013-19998&t=1003&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]Newsweek headline reads Henry Cuellar lone Democrat to vote against
abortion rights as bill passes House

And just this week, Cuellar said abortion was NOT health care.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75253?refcode=em20211013-19998&t=1004&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]Laredo Times headline reads 'It's called conscience': Cuellar says
abortion 'not women's health'

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75253?refcode=em20211013-19998&t=1005&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]Defeat anti-choice Cuellar and elect Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros.
Chip in now »

Justice Democrats defeated the only other anti-choice Democrat in the
House last year, when we helped Marie Newman unseat Dan Lipinski. We have
the chance right now to defeat Cuellar and elect Justice Democrat Jessica
Cisneros. Jessica will fight for the people in so many ways Cuellar won’t.
First and foremost, Jessica will defend abortion rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75253?refcode=em20211013-19998&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]If you want to defeat Cuellar with us, please chip in
$3 or anything at all right now. We need support right away
to help Jessica build a winning campaign.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75253?refcode=em20211013-19998&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]Chip in $3 Now

Last year, Cuellar only beat Jessica by 2,600 votes. We need your support
right now to make up the difference in 2022.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211013-19998-footer&t=1028&refcode2=19998_1203867_uQP-V0&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=19998%2E1203867%2EuQP-V0

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Control of the Senate hinges on my race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
please read this | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGq8zGPo755bhlEAr8qt8JsZH4juaOy8FJ11NiYZVXNprnmlHl_UC6XF9ioJSkMMeYV1jQaMcVENceV5d_y74E7jFnziuns-fd0B_2Uxi7agrH-AWv5JBsbYMWs-f4xfs37jT8zi3LmoUHy4rrZ6aeUaEm4KYfTAMUx5SiaMFTOnmvfMUvZ1cNcBdaEfzwNs47Ey2KFk9uGtoKnYHp1qnSR1KkS6g8M2twIz97E4jL1ojlGeQc5YqArL17VfdxZwHHLlbaCS6klVlV8fknxGYJ-6tc8yQfK4vO6gXSgzh9zXB-7kkAKqNdUkTDzjPN8-GjA/3g4/GgnaP41tTUWH6QTR1Qwf3g/h0/W-9LcVu3XY4fk2UOtj9GYE9EN4ZcBxebHPySZRF1LIY)
**Derek, Senate control hinges on my race in Nevada – and I wish I was dropping into your inbox with better news:** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGq8zGPo755bhlEAr8qt8JsaGCsmjBDEWKr8AxG721fxEEHPxIVeVVI1539E2_jJftqHPNuoY1EINnYwgxNojrqLLkT2fMuOQZN7j47ro97rRKUfixpHRRPGYHDOh_BAn3JcnhRuKh8hZk7OnokYApQCm6QHcHSkZPeP902xTbypOLtSEQvZ92gk_5Fto8uUJ8FziQWydSc0ExtvAuUJDdeBWjVBKj22lFVLxH2jQSOsQgEF02_Nx3EDV9ceO9siaCeLf-lBgSTMcF0ScRug4M5UZKCdT7VWrGe5qQ-UJzSjxWswx3rhsqEQjwdLCHqnAWg/3g4/GgnaP41tTUWH6QTR1Qwf3g/h1/qP7HUkCbG8jUUKTYHUqxQeZmCVV8EnFt59jO-ZGTGMQ)
1. I'm **being massively outspent** by GOP outside groups: They have already poured over **$1 million** into Nevada to defeat me.
2. _The Cook Political Report_ just **downgraded** my chances of winning – just as CNN is calling Nevada **a top pickup opportunity** for Republicans.
3. **I’m still $6,978 behind my midnight fundraising goal.** And I urgently need _your_ help to make up the gap before midnight, friend.

Fellow American,

It’s been eight years since the great people of the Commonwealth of Kentucky elected me to represent them and, in that time, I’ve worked to restore the American dream, fight against a worldwide pandemic, rebuild our economy, and protect our Nation from national security threats.

But Fellow American, as a nation, we are currently facing the largest threat yet - the Radical Left who have taken over the Democrat Party.

These radicals have opened our borders to over a million illegal aliens, unconstitutionally mandated COVID-19 vaccines, abandoned our foreign policy principles (and left innocent Americans stranded), and have proposed to spend $3.5 trillion to spend on even more radical policies. _Enough is enough!_

Biden, Kamala, Pelosi, and Schumer are single-handedly putting America last, and Americans nationwide are suffering at the hand of their incompetence.

I believe to my core that America is the greatest nation in the history of the world - which is why I’m working so hard to save our country. The current leadership is poisoning our conservative way of life - our only option is to secure a Republican majority next year and flip the House.

clean_body: As a country, we are currently facing the largest threat yet... | No longer want to receive emails from Andy Barr for Congress? You may . - Fellow American, It’s been eight years since the great people of the Commonwealth of Kentucky elected me to represent them and, in that time, I’ve worked to restore the American dream, fight against a worldwide pandemic, rebuild our economy, and protect our Nation from national security threats. But Fellow American, as a nation, we are currently facing the largest threat yet - the Radical Left who have taken over the Democrat Party. These radicals have opened our borders to over a million illegal aliens, unconstitutionally mandated COVID-19 vaccines, abandoned our foreign policy principles (and left innocent Americans stranded), and have proposed to spend $3.5 trillion to spend on even more radical policies. Enough is enough! Biden, Kamala, Pelosi, and Schumer are single-handedly putting America last, and Americans nationwide are suffering at the hand of their incompetence. I believe to my core that America is the greatest nation in the history of the world - which is why I’m working so hard to save our country. The current leadership is poisoning our conservative way of life - our only option is to secure a Republican majority next year and flip the House. Democrats have a razor-thin majority in the House right now. They know that our side is fired up about their ridiculous agenda they’ve been pushing for months. Critical race theory in schools Amnesty for illegal aliens Massive tax increases This is just the beginning, Fellow American. Democrats want a socialist country. It’s never been more critical to take back the House and FIRE these America-Last Democrats. Your investment today safeguards our conservative principles and sends a clear message to the Left: the days of failed leadership are numbered. For the future of America, Andy Barr | MEET ANDY Andy Barr ran for Congress for a cause - to save America from bankruptcy, restore the American Dream and keep the American people safe and secure. Andy has never stopped fighting for these principles. Now more than ever, it is critical for central and eastern Kentuckians to have a strong, proven, and accountable leader representing them in Congress. | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Andy Barr for Congress Christopher E. Anderson, C.P.A., Treasurer Mailing Address: P.O. Box 2059 Lexington, KY 40588

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom's Blunder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom's Florida Blunder](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorWsPGUhPeow0aviQyrpNipGscqHLI00IsJp50w0h3VWQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_13&n=1) Gavin Newsom has repeatedly suggested a state’s current COVID “case rate” is the measure of its success. Currently, Florida’s case rate is lower than California’s. Florida has fared better in every respect, including age-adjusted mortality. Their kids have been in school without masks and businesses open without mandates. Nontheless, Newsom continues to brag about imposing vaccine mandates on young children – while _opposing_ them for his biggest Special Interest donors. The solution to this madness is my Resolution, ACR 46, to end the State of Emergency and terminate Newsom’s emergency powers. The problem is legislators are too useless to pass it. Yet that hasn’t stopped them from getting paid more. Their per diem “allowance” was just raised to $214 per day, over $40,000 annually. (I'm again declining it entirely and also refusing the salary increase.) Meanwhile, Tesla has left for Texas. 74 other companies moved their HQ out of California the first half of this year. And 182,000 people packed up U-Hauls last year. Newsom and the Legislature's response: new laws to ban gas-powered leaf blowers and require "gender neutral" toy aisles. Your government is beyond broken. [Help me fix it](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_13&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyRq_ptyH9xNvHKYv5VaX0F8iGWrbclQ_hSRGOk7JHICQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_13&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_13&n=4)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_13&n=5).

body:
CNN knows that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections. |
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkM1OwzAQhJ_GvTmK107jHnIoaUIFqBLlR-IUubbTGBw3chwQb49TCgdOSNZK_mZ3tDuqAJYzqhemgBQISQkFkq1YlpAkzeuabQjN2WpZVjVDLO3FUQgZzMkJq31I5KlfdAWXaXbgiiwZKH1QGW8ZpBnL2uxAGUlhYYsuhGFEdI2gjm_UcvI6-TDOazWbRBa06HGn_Sg7bbFxMjIRgpBvI1avHntE6yn0zXiavNSIbrx-R7CckRT9IMzRRSidu8BeKzP1EeleGBvhKOPn-8iUN9tq_1Buq7umqprNzb4pdzu8fnxcl7cPzb56ntmP-8kF7UIcdtLi6uVwfz10q91TlBtnjYrCHzieoWYrzlvOMVWCYaZajnnOKQYCgouWkCgufKGGD2OtGZd5zPc473pONZ5kTftZoPwKAUxTtAQ4Bwj_MZ6boYw1fA76d_JimlwiAZRvvgDwDpni)

Friend,

I knew it was only a matter of time before left-leaning news networks would start attempting to slander our campaign at every possible opportunity.

CNN has stepped into the role they've come to embrace over the years: The Democrat Party's mouthpiece. _Recently they published a story about me that couldn't be further from the truth._

The truth is that Democrats – including the top executives at CNN – know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections.

**Friend, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy.**

My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. **[Can I count on you to help us ensure we hit our goal before midnight with a gift of $10, $25, $100 – or even my favorite number, $34!](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkMuO4jAQRb_G7BzFj2BnkQWTh1DPiAW0ZhsVtgOedgxyHBB_Pw7D9KJXLVkl-dyqq6qrK8oFZ2ZlK5pTQnLCKClKXmQky0XX8YYwwct13XYc8XyEE4CK9uLBmRAzdRlX52rQoKGAEkRZqmN-VMDFmrOy0EWZH9mwctU5xuuE2AbRLr3JqDmY7G59MHoxSSwaGPHZhEmdjcPWq8QgRlAfE9Z_Ag6IdXMc--kyB2UQa4K5IbpekILxCvbkE1Tev-BotJ3HhMwI1iU4qfT5d2Qu-227P9Tb9lfftn3ztu_r3Q5v3t839c9Dv29_L-y_-8VH42Ma9srhbbdtbrEodvck995ZnYQvcHpCw0spBykx08Ax14PEUkiGKaEgYSAkiatQ6evdOmentUj5npZdn6mmk5wdHhUSPxCl85wsKX0GSL9jvDTTOtX4uJrPyZdp9oqEItH8BXeGmq8)**

[** STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA → **](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkMtuwyAQRb-G7LDMIzZZeJE6tqq-FmnVRTcWhnFCAyTCuFH_vjhNu-iqEhqJc2euZq6uKC85g4WpaE4JyQmjZLniy4xkedm2fENYyVdF3bQc8dzJnZQqmqOXFkLM1NEt9hURBRO9Vv2yGPqBLPth1au87wvFQA5KLmy1j_E0IrZGtE1vBDUFyM7GB9CzSWIRpMN7CKPag8XGq8RkjFIdRqzfAw6ItVN03XicggLENgE-EC1mpKQ7SbPzCSrvr9CBNpNLCJw0NsFRpc_3kbnobpvtc33bPHRN023utl399ITXLy_r-v652zavM_txP_oIPqZhryx-BPUWDu788Zrkzlujk_AHjhcIfCXEIARmWnLM9SCwKAXDlFAp5EBIEheh0qezsdaMRZny3c27XlJNJ1kzfFaovEGUTlOypPQSIP2P8dxM61Tj5wl-J6-m2TUSisrNF79mnPQ)
When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on – or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way.

I chose the latter because the future of our country – and the future of Georgia – is too important to sit on the sidelines.

**[You would be doing me a great honor if you would support our campaign to take back the Senate with a contribution today.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkF1PwyAUhn8Nu6MpHyv0oheza12cWeI0xruGAd1QyhagLvv30jm98MqEkPAczpNzXlVhyijRM1PhHCOUI4LRvKTzDGU5a1u6RITRsqiblgKaD2IvhIzm6ITVPmbyOMwOFZnv6LxkVOSqVGLX71BBGZI7rfI-T66ZrQ4xngIgC4DbdIKWo9fZ2Tiv1SRJLGoxwIP2QR60hcbJxESMQn4EqN499IC0Yxy6cBy91IAsvf4EuJiQFMNJmL1LUDp3g4NWZhwS0oMwNsEg0-N7yZx3q2b7XK-ax65puuXDtqs3G7h4eVnU6-du27xO7Md-dFG7mJqdtHBdPIVw_7aoRSp3zhqVCn9guEJNS857ziFRgkKqeg454wRihAUXPUKpOPOVOp2NtSYULOW7n2a9pppWsqa_VIDdAYzHMSkxvgaI_yOePuM63fFy0r-dN2l2iwQDtvwCyaqaVw)**

Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Friend, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022.

We've got to be ready for anything.

Thank you,
