The truth is that Democrats – including the top executives at CNN – know that the Georgia Senate race will determine whether Republicans or Democrats are in charge after next year's midterm elections. Friend, we know that distorting facts is what Democrats do best. Well, I want to show my Democrat opponent and his supporters in the media that I've got the support of the conservative grassroots behind my candidacy. My opponents need to know that when they try and attack our campaign, we'll work even harder to raise the funds necessary to win this race. I'm setting a goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight in response to the recent attacks on me and my campaign. When I was considering my entrance into the U.S. Senate race in Georgia, I faced a choice: let a progressive Democrat easily win reelection against another Republican not ready to take him on – or get into the race, win, and risk having the media attempt to tarnish my good name along the way. I chose the latter because the future of our country – and the future of Georgia – is too important to sit on the sidelines. Democrats know there is not a more critical Senate race than the one in Georgia, Friend, that's why the attacks on me are going to be constant between now and November 2022. We've got to be ready for anything. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Erica Smith
subject: Re: Mark Robinson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is unacceptable.
#
Last week, a video of North Carolina Lt. Governor Mark Robinson making horrific comments surfaced. During a speech Mark Robinson said, _“There’s no reason anybody anywhere in America should be telling any child about transgenderism, homosexuality, any of that filth.”_
**Let me be clear****, I firmly and whole-heartedly condemn Mark Robinson’s comments.** It is completely unacceptable that someone with the position of Lieutenant Governor is able to make these comments and I’m honestly disgusted that he felt he could say this out loud.
**Mark Robinson needs to resign.**[**_If you agree please sign your name now to show Mark Robinson that North Carolina is no place for hatred »_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/mark-robinson-must-resign?source=em20211013-544&t=1&akid=544%2E3698%2E3uwOnF)
**[Sign on now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/mark-robinson-must-resign?source=em20211013-544&t=2&akid=544%2E3698%2E3uwOnF)**
Unfortunately Mark Robinson’s recent comments don’t come as a surprise — and that makes it worse, not better. After the 2016 shooting at Pulse nightclub Mark said:
_“I pray for the souls of all those killed, healing for all those wounded, and comfort for the family members of the terrorist shooting in Orlando. However, homosexuality is STILL an abominable sin and I WILL NOT join in ‘celebrating gay pride’ nor will I fly their sacrilegious flag on my page.”_
**Mark Robinson is ROBBING US of progressive North Carolinian representation, and he is unfit for office. The people of North Carolina deserve better representation than a homophobic, transphobic Lt. Governor.**
This is what I’m fighting tooth and nail against. This is exactly the type of hateful representative North Carolina could have in the Senate if we don’t build broad support for progressive representation.
EVERYONE in North Carolina should feel loved, respected, and accepted. This MUST be the last time that Mark Robinson gets away with his offensive, hurtful, and bigoted comments.
[**_Will you join me in condemning Mark's comments and call for his resignation? We must raise our collective voice to fight back against hatred everywhere._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/mark-robinson-must-resign?source=em20211013-544&t=3&akid=544%2E3698%2E3uwOnF)
**[Sign on now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/mark-robinson-must-resign?source=em20211013-544&t=4&akid=544%2E3698%2E3uwOnF)**
In solidarity,
Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211013-544-footer&t=5&refcode2=544_3698_3uwOnF&akid=544%2E3698%2E3uwOnF)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

Big rally in Michigan yesterday, unbelievable spirit and knowledge of what went on with respect to voting and vote counting in the 2020 Presidential Election. Detroit, considered for many years to be one of the most corrupt places in the United States for elections (and many other things!), had large-scale irregularities so much so that two officials, at great risk to themselves and their families, refused to certify the results, and were sadly threatened. Even the RINOs on the Senate Committee found 289,866 absentee ballots that were sent to people who never requested them, “something that would be illegal.” Why did they viciously kick out the Republican poll watchers? Seventy percent of Detroit’s mail-in ballot counting boards didn’t match, it was a total mess. Why won’t they give respected professionals and representatives at yesterday’s rally the right to do a Forensic Audit of Wayne County (Detroit) and Macomb County? Hopefully, each one of these cowardly RINOs, whose names will be identified and forthcoming, will be primaried, with my Complete and Total Endorsement, in the upcoming election. As father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it, I am disturbed by our lack of leadership. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2ea566b5b74b71b66e3ac351e53443&_e=QZ00FME-Z3GYXHD3J1xIry7rWf56kXl6QDRoX2OkMDPSUdkfEiaG-VHFhcVgpF81tGExpjWvX3HqQiKbhM3Stz2xkN2s9pS0y7oIbIKwOisbVf6eGKDB-PxSn3mZhMQ-XuE12c66ukMgvO_tJUlNRj-UUe-iApLcpwg3wB_ioe0XHFRkIa36CpBZxByEt-nVpP_t7KA2jBY230wikeiDMLT03bl8jJ8B9T99tlFV2ojjYN1R02g5PmzgBnwWzaPa0ePdkJjAVZHUDCk2poaJ97ASfNwbdGuIg0nFczB57a80Od004szO2_Tyq1mc4l4WkujL87GhKXz2YYLuruVe2dFtJOsLRTGNNOMcq3ZRzsyLRV0Di7fBzQDmRSEnzCBBMtJj-G821qNN_-dk2OshkueG0c2tqtexNNwX4xyrB78FRDINuc9SuQJz0zQK8jUCePgNWgMi1Z4wiIcEf9Av9PzPEN2SpMqbMc_qnOLN1ik%3D)

Fellow patriot,

I want to re-introduce myself. I’m Shawn Collins – I’m a black conservative, a U.S. Navy combat veteran who served in Afghanistan, an active U.S. Navy reservist, a husband, and a father.

I’m running for Congress in California’s 45th District – a seat that was represented by Republicans for decades until Democrat Katie Porter flipped it in the 2016 “Blue Wave”.

This seat is one of the best chances we have to flip a seat back to Republican in 2022, [**and I’m going to need your help to do it.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2ea566b5b74b71b66e3ac351e53443&_e=QZ00FME-Z3GYXHD3J1xIry7rWf56kXl6QDRoX2OkMDPSUdkfEiaG-VHFhcVgpF81tGExpjWvX3HqQiKbhM3Stz2xkN2s9pS0y7oIbIKwOisbVf6eGKDB-PxSn3mZhMQ-XuE12c66ukMgvO_tJUlNRj-UUe-iApLcpwg3wB_ioe0XHFRkIa36CpBZxByEt-nVpP_t7KA2jBY230wikeiDMLT03bl8jJ8B9T99tlFV2ojjYN1R02g5PmzgBnwWzaPa0ePdkJjAVZHUDCk2poaJ945ROeRsZAnAGAHE9fPP6MFCso3yNMw5czRa0l4aQw5aXcMQTdpoX0zP5XN_Q88quin09xKLbu_3ZVgJWE-KUovVkdtjoXZ8VPCChzK9N4N9Jmyjf2yXf2HS7ryepFDe7YPvCWL88SKy1dbvej6olLE6zrt02WcpfPmjqqLPKfNLb_7ujFhy6EOoUkD5-o3xZMCL6PB0bE7T7bqcXOJcWLY%3D)

But let me tell you why I’m running. **We need new leadership in America.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2ea566b5b74b71b66e3ac351e53443&_e=QZ00FME-Z3GYXHD3J1xIry7rWf56kXl6QDRoX2OkMDPSUdkfEiaG-VHFhcVgpF81tGExpjWvX3HqQiKbhM3Stz2xkN2s9pS0y7oIbIKwOisbVf6eGKDB-PxSn3mZhMQ-XuE12c66ukMgvO_tJUlNRj-UUe-iApLcpwg3wB_ioe0XHFRkIa36CpBZxByEt-nVpP_t7KA2jBY230wikeiDMLT03bl8jJ8B9T99tlFV2ojjYN1R02g5PmzgBnwWzaPa0ePdkJjAVZHUDCk2poaJ91Y9qY6rAJmxIHXXKJ_rR0QqDkgrFv3_Uk_vR8n8V22KNFldGVQR-kj_T7GY8dFa6HVnu8bjNhqvsQwuR1NwfZyihWnxvDY10Y_7hFab_kzLaeJksev0rVjhqQ_rDSymi_1Y_kAsd2gfHFgxdeDbD_pulbILCPeqNhx_ivCoHc18-3XkE3NHoVARKsuBiax1c-XA8Rlzeph5O7eIrHqrvmw%3D)
I grew up in a disadvantaged home in a poor suburb of Dallas. My parents divorced when I was three years old. I had every reason to be convinced that I could not change my circumstances.

But fortunately for me, the American Dream was alive and strong.

My parents both taught me about hard work, accountability, and resiliency. Those traits combined with my love of basketball lead me to attend Rice University, where I played Division 1 basketball.

After law school, when I was admitted to the bar, I took an oath to support the Constitution. _But eventually I realized that was not enough for me_ – **so I made the decision to fight for the Constitution I swore to defend and joined the U.S. Navy.**

Shortly after my wife Zeina – who is an immigrant – and I were married, I deployed on a combat mission to Afghanistan. While in Afghanistan, I helped negotiate with key leaders in the region **and even survived two assassination-attempt bombings.**

Now, as father of four who has lived the American Dream and fought for my country so others could achieve it as well, I am greatly disturbed by the lack of leadership in America.

I’m running for Congress to help give our country the leadership we so badly need in order to keep America a safe, secure and prosperous nation full of opportunity.

[**Will you support my campaign, help me flip CA-45, and restore a conservative majority to Congress by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or even more today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2ea566b5b74b71b66e3ac351e53443&_e=QZ00FME-Z3GYXHD3J1xIry7rWf56kXl6QDRoX2OkMDPSUdkfEiaG-VHFhcVgpF81tGExpjWvX3HqQiKbhM3Stz2xkN2s9pS0y7oIbIKwOisbVf6eGKDB-PxSn3mZhMQ-XuE12c66ukMgvO_tJUlNRj-UUe-iApLcpwg3wB_ioe0XHFRkIa36CpBZxByEt-nVpP_t7KA2jBY230wikeiDMLT03bl8jJ8B9T99tlFV2ojjYN1R02g5PmzgBnwWzaPa0ePdkJjAVZHUDCk2poaJ98MceoUP3wqCqvO40lChdScumI9-lF0xlq2YBccKjPNpzEpytDGVo5bG4OysOjL7WFyuzhlZvYRi_-ngkEXvISoYHIo3OVjhJk5IniPhXWOj1mZ27akp-H3axgdABsQAOvN8UJFQqZ_GrV9jQDfbVvvewVxkEXqzlpdpOlIXjOkGxtu0T3VhLObtED_yfnCardTFDK_dq66TQegSrwME5zk%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2ea566b5b74b71b66e3ac351e53443&_e=QZ00FME-Z3GYXHD3J1xIry7rWf56kXl6QDRoX2OkMDPSUdkfEiaG-VHFhcVgpF81tGExpjWvX3HqQiKbhM3Stz2xkN2s9pS0y7oIbIKwOisbVf6eGKDB-PxSn3mZhMQ-XuE12c66ukMgvO_tJUlNRj-UUe-iApLcpwg3wB_ioe0XHFRkIa36CpBZxByEt-nVpP_t7KA2jBY230wikeiDMLT03bl8jJ8B9T99tlFV2ojjYN1R02g5PmzgBnwWzaPa0ePdkJjAVZHUDCk2poaJ94EOFjsirZb61wOvSZlOH2bZ21Jt68wFBHYaeqvkglOSK22s6-RnyK2ymmsgORk4wX6alnmf8XsDH76u0tfNcGM_LJglhB-iEeKNaW3wDBFMpK7FQ0uJ2GSPvexX6u-sIUHX8qCwJm0DfL9ze-iAzSb3GkKcoQoHRvocSsrqCWbXR-FJijZ87NzJRxlFO5mJOpU_wyah9aHl6LOMozbWkiE%3D)
On Biden’s watch, we have had a disastrous and dishonorable withdrawal from Afghanistan that undid everything I fought for, and thousands died for, over the last twenty years.

Democrats are spending trillions of dollars we don’t have on pet projects we can’t afford which is driving up debt and inflation and hurting our economy.

Since Democrats took over, nothing has gotten better – in fact, **it’s getting worse.** No one – not Biden, not Katie Porter – is providing America with the leadership we need.

We must be **spending wisely** and _lowering_ (not raising) taxes, especially in this difficult economic climate.

We must be supporting our **military** AND our **law enforcement** as they work to protect us.

We must improve our **education** system, put more emphasis on STEM fields, and secure a brighter future for our children.

We must address the national security and humanitarian crisis at the border by securing it and streamlining the legal immigration process so more people like my wife can have the opportunity to come to our country legally and achieve the American Dream.

**We can do all these things and more, but only if we have new leadership in America.**

[**I’m running for Congress, and I need support from patriots like you to not only flip this target seat in CA-45, but ensure we have a new conservative majority in Congress. Will you stand with me by supporting my campaign with a contribution of $10, $25, $50 or even more today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2ea566b5b74b71b66e3ac351e53443&_e=QZ00FME-Z3GYXHD3J1xIry7rWf56kXl6QDRoX2OkMDPSUdkfEiaG-VHFhcVgpF81tGExpjWvX3HqQiKbhM3Stz2xkN2s9pS0y7oIbIKwOisbVf6eGKDB-PxSn3mZhMQ-XuE12c66ukMgvO_tJUlNRj-UUe-iApLcpwg3wB_ioe0XHFRkIa36CpBZxByEt-nVpP_t7KA2jBY230wikeiDMLT03bl8jJ8B9T99tlFV2ojjYN1R02g5PmzgBnwWzaPa0ePdkJjAVZHUDCk2poaJ9wlVnlE-L_upd8AatxbdJILqWr-fpNzTnBK1vXCs8HR21iRSHm2wjb0r6yhc-RFfAscJG7a13oIpxEmLYFwdL_jIguzadpLvTUveizkTbOZkXYDCiVlqFzaWwifM8o3BpeR9oS3R4LfVxTISfq2jjzVR6bQbNcn-Gj2vFUrMhFuLZKyiIQt0yW996QD_wXPuzUkPoYhfYSsTsGinxrv8rjA%3D)

Thank you for your support!

For America,

Shawn Collins
U.S. Navy veteran
Republican for Congress

| | We need to be on high alert, Derek.

The last time fundraising numbers became public, we learned that Glenn Youngkin is outraising us — but only because he cut himself a multi-million dollar check from his personal fortune.

He could do it again. At any moment.

Derek, with early voting underway in Virginia, and polls showing a virtual tie, that would be a disaster for Virginia and our battle against Trumpism in our country.

**That’s why we’ve got to hit tomorrow night’s $500,000 fundraising goal — it’s the only way we’ll ensure we have enough resources to stand up to Glenn’s pile of cash.**

**_[So today, will you make a contribution to help reach our goal? name: Laura Loomer
subject: Facebook’s secret "Dangerous" list leaked . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
In May of 2019, Facebook created a small list of “Dangerous Individuals”, and I made the cut along with Alex Jones, Milo Yiannopoulos and InfoWars journalist Paul Joseph Watson.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/3XxqXwF763f2rmUVTAPYQIJQ/D5f66vlrZPoxVM0C892Yq5ZQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/3XxqXwF763f2rmUVTAPYQIJQ/D5f66vlrZPoxVM0C892Yq5ZQ) In May of 2019, Facebook created a small list of “Dangerous Individuals”, and I made the cut along with Alex Jones, Milo Yiannopoulos and InfoWars journalist Paul Joseph Watson.

At the time, six people were on the list that resulted in a **complete digital erasure of our existence on Facebook and Instagram** – the world’s largest social media publisher.

What they did was wrong – **and now they’ve been caught massively expanding the program**.

Today, I’m running for U.S. Congress to fight the control that Big Tech has over our lives and culture, and [**I need your help to win**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/3XxqXwF763f2rmUVTAPYQIJQ/D5f66vlrZPoxVM0C892Yq5ZQ).

| | [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/3XxqXwF763f2rmUVTAPYQIJQ/D5f66vlrZPoxVM0C892Yq5ZQ)
---

Last night, Facebook’s secret list of **“Dangerous Individuals and Organizations”** was leaked to the media and published by _The Intercept_ and it’s grown from me and five others – **to THOUSANDS of people and organizations**.

The 100-page list includes categories in which 53% are terrorism related while 40% of the list is made up of largely American groups and people who are banned due to their political speech and non-violent offline activities.

But let’s start with their thousands of bans for terrorism – Facebook, despite having 350 employees dedicated to their “dangerous” list, can’t even get that right.

| [STAND UP TO THE BIG TECH TYRANTS](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/3XxqXwF763f2rmUVTAPYQIJQ/D5f66vlrZPoxVM0C892Yq5ZQ)
---

For instance, Abu Muslim al-Turkmani is on Facebook’s list. **But Abu the ISIS terrorist hasn’t been too active on Facebook for a few years since he was killed in 2015 by a Special Forces soldier that I’m friends with!** A number of other terrorist groups on Facebook’s list don’t even exist anymore!

Now, I’m not going to shed a tear over Facebook’s incompetence, but when they silence conservatives – it’s not incompetence, it’s sinister strategy designed to control our culture and elections by silencing millions of Americas.

| [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO WASHINGTON](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/3XxqXwF763f2rmUVTAPYQIJQ/D5f66vlrZPoxVM0C892Yq5ZQ)
---

Another example of Facebook’s blatant bias is their inclusion of a militia group in Virginia as a “militarized social movement”.

Sounds scary right?

**Well, the group that Facebook considers “dangerous” is a reserve component of the Virginia National Guard!** When their Governor needs them in the event of a disaster, they proudly serve!

But Facebook considers them “dangerous” because they have uniforms and carry guns.

Now, where Facebook’s secret list gets interesting is in the “Hate” category.

Kicking off the list are Adolf Eichmann and Adolf Hitler – as in THE Adolf Hitler.

While Hitler won’t be logging into Facebook anytime soon – the tyrants at Facebook included one of the most despicable figures in human history on their list to malign the others on the list like Gavin McInnes, Joe Biggs, Alex Jones, Enrique Tarrio, Milo Yiannopolous and people like me who have appeared on this list!

Facebook’s actions aren’t about maintaining community standards or keeping their site safe from “hate speech” – **it’s about RUINING the reputations of groups and individuals without due process or debate!**

It’s about interfering in elections by denying so-called “hateful” individuals like me and President Trump the ability to campaign online!

**Facebook wants to make everyone CRINGE at the thought of associating with people like me who are willing to stand up and speak truth to power!**
This is nothing more than social control at the hands of Big Tech tyrants, and we have to put an end to it [**by exposing these people and holding them accountable!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/3XxqXwF763f2rmUVTAPYQIJQ/D5f66vlrZPoxVM0C892Yq5ZQ)

clean_body: In May of 2019, Facebook created a small list of “Dangerous Individuals”, and I made the cut along with Alex Jones, Milo Yiannopoulos and InfoWars journalist Paul Joseph Watson. | | | Patriot, In May of 2019, Facebook created a small list of “Dangerous Individuals”, and I made the cut along with Alex Jones, Milo Yiannopoulos and InfoWars journalist Paul Joseph Watson. At the time, six people were on the list that resulted in a complete digital erasure of our existence on Facebook and Instagram – the world’s largest social media publisher. What they did was wrong – and now they’ve been caught massively expanding the program. Today, I’m running for U.S. Congress to fight the control that Big Tech has over our lives and culture, and . | | Last night, Facebook’s secret list of “Dangerous Individuals and Organizations” was leaked to the media and published by The Intercept and it’s grown from me and five others – to THOUSANDS of people and organizations. The 100-page list includes categories in which 53% are terrorism related while 40% of the list is made up of largely American groups and people who are banned due to their political speech and non-violent offline activities. But let’s start with their thousands of bans for terrorism – Facebook, despite having 350 employees dedicated to their “dangerous” list, can’t even get that right. | For instance, Abu Muslim al-Turkmani is on Facebook’s list. But Abu the ISIS terrorist hasn’t been too active on Facebook for a few years since he was killed in 2015 by a Special Forces soldier that I’m friends with! A number of other terrorist groups on Facebook’s list don’t even exist anymore! Now, I’m not going to shed a tear over Facebook’s incompetence, but when they silence conservatives – it’s not incompetence, it’s sinister strategy designed to control our culture and elections by silencing millions of Americas. | Another example of Facebook’s blatant bias is their inclusion of a militia group in Virginia as a “militarized social movement”. Sounds scary right? Well, the group that Facebook considers “dangerous” is a reserve component of the Virginia National Guard! When their Governor needs them in the event of a disaster, they proudly serve! But Facebook considers them “dangerous” because they have uniforms and carry guns. Now, where Facebook’s secret list gets interesting is in the “Hate” category. Kicking off the list are Adolf Eichmann and Adolf Hitler – as in THE Adolf Hitler. While Hitler won’t be logging into Facebook anytime soon – the tyrants at Facebook included one of the most despicable figures in human history on their list to malign the others on the list like Gavin McInnes, Joe Biggs, Alex Jones, Enrique Tarrio, Milo Yiannopolous and people like me who have appeared on this list! Facebook’s actions aren’t about maintaining community standards or keeping their site safe from “hate speech” – it’s about RUINING the reputations of groups and individuals without due process or debate! It’s about interfering in elections by denying so-called “hateful” individuals like me and President Trump the ability to campaign online! Facebook wants to make everyone CRINGE at the thought of associating with people like me who are willing to stand up and speak truth to power! This is nothing more than social control at the hands of Big Tech tyrants, and we have to put an end to it and send a message to the Big Tech tyrants that they are no longer in control! name: Team WisGOP
subject: Standing up for sporting freedom
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- Rock legend Ted Nugent joined Republicans in the State Legislature today in support of their **[new bills](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=dVZ-vRNi4kg6Qjrexk0IqhQZ9s1z5qTc9iwMc1RjLF7S3_UeaGAV4VHp5ppeIuU9iyP8n-emWDLXagRUepDAVP5Dh_rZpm36fyJJ3bOEvnbIxUVvQSdRTqLQGyr26Y8mscByh0gxMFDp4R35DyQVjGaN6F1xwzt9hwiT2616LsC0K5v9_hQKgKIaGFve2AKBtdHMN8QoXV4RfAglg-FAAQW9WzTWEf7kN8NM_S1voHE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=2)** that preserve Wisconsin’s rich sporting heritage. While Democrats’ continue to fight for liberal elites in Madison, Republicans are fighting to defend rural Wisconsinites’ way of life. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=dVZ-vRNi4kg6Qjrexk0IqhQZ9s1z5qTc9iwMc1RjLF7S3_UeaGAV4VHp5ppeIuU9iyP8n-emWDLXagRUepDAVP5Dh_rZpm36fyJJ3bOEvnbIxUVvQSdRTqLQGyr26Y8mscByh0gxMFDp4R35DyQVjGaN6F1xwzt9hwiT2616LsC0K5v9_hQKgKIaGFve2AKBtdHMN8QoXV4RfAglg-FAAQW9WzTWEf7kN8NM_S1voHE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=3) The Wisconsin Sporting Freedom Package protects the rights of our state’s hunters and anglers, who are powerful economic drivers and natural resource partners, and expand hunting in Wisconsin. The package also includes the [**Constitutional Carry Bill**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=cj1hBL8U4-SRnSTVTJJYTtECaSh-7lDYf6fltii5ddQiFQ3KUtYsE_-6tmCHbZDRXxfXVOpfqH-xReTMzsSBWQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=4) , which would guarantee that Wisconsinites can exercise their right to carry a gun under the rights already afforded to them by the Second Amendment. You can read a full list of the new bills [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=35iTR8mWjM6PA_r3iqFtK_4_qfKoIvFh2PEsoMchUvMLjBHUOHq7CrCpB8cowtmALzjLMR_vrlkHoCis5L7iAf_aOTKSWxuCtFaAUVcya2M&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=5) , or read more about today’s press conference [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=dVZ-vRNi4kg6Qjrexk0IqhQZ9s1z5qTc9iwMc1RjLF7S3_UeaGAV4VHp5ppeIuU9iyP8n-emWDLXagRUepDAVP5Dh_rZpm36fyJJ3bOEvnbIxUVvQSdRTqLQGyr26Y8mscByh0gxMFDp4R35DyQVjGaN6F1xwzt9hwiT2616LsC0K5v9_hQKgKIaGFve2AKBtdHMN8QoXV4RfAglg-FAAQW9WzTWEf7kN8NM_S1voHE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=6). While the Democrats fight for gun grabs and policies that hurt rural America, Republicans will always fight to preserve Wisconsinites' Second Amendment rights. You can sign up to volunteer to help us elect constitutional conservatives [**here**.](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=7) If you cannot volunteer, but would like to support our efforts financially, click **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV6NnbNwdlgqpqyjPmKiPHdVmvcC1-Zzwp4GekbjPFN1Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=8)**. Thanks, Team WisGOP | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV6NnbNwdlgqpqyjPmKiPHdVmvcC1-Zzwp4GekbjPFN1Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=9 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV6NnbNwdlgqpqyjPmKiPHdVmvcC1-Zzwp4GekbjPFN1Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sporting_freedom_3&n=9)

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Do you know how many black Republicans there are in Congress?

body:
I'm a proud Haitian-American REPUBLICAN running for Congress to prove to the Democrat Party that they don't have a monopoly on black Americans. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_t=vuydDFfLSKbj9OSVZ2LrcdQyNuzgr5sKaHHG1oKul2_beB-YSslQ82_cUQVaNvDKOeaDIX_dFLAok4Te26AYiEKDqfhs9mKYnFigk_fqRzFwpAdNET2ZPtTu6h_KrJn1Z8pkQgNFVbvF0CD5v67okFen_7nzVxCGEvAWGTIc7zg%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaMObpKBpMiHWBc0mJKMjfSrGphiSmBLgAQ8STFLfcWJkzHz-B8AcxNCAGt2Ae1N9kCJd7Vg1Z8CcBuo7t_UzxsVp4YY1nQkU_kH7rJ4J9GYgocBd4Nk4tFViZM2mOqzTF6hYifIyhs0rb93Gsm1V7pyM5piwTsbcVSLsWRKYlX1IFpBkn76Zm13r-5J1v09WSh9q-Edzyb3pUaHmVFlczKA%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaI27B1T22YzKRSp9BEiwxUG9AfuKqQnDw6S-W_7XRsXGAU6tbq1qPZ0iZAdyWOO0JtT5YOx8sj0Oh3bd9VB4SFLeYP0SpMbN4rVRrAOZLrheGr2d6PUjFjUEaHJm5TzeuRnaNCsh1Q01Ioufig61XUm-97eB7anj-xVM6SnqzaamJHZD3hUXxWrH6FreNoTww4g7Qk6wtxL04YUlqpk0WeE%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaD7F7xrnKImkuuFqv0zN7anz2R_bxTJHJiF1ovBS7-1YQPQ_iwDctyh0IuhXOZnQc68ZCW1s7LdPR3qUE6L5YpXRdrLlV9VXliDgKphVeHEJfzA1KeGAje9EIS5yhykdRz0Vhiq6OMtObHx9uKMGL5vbO0NeA7hW-vCVfV7M6xrRCjERbYoNteArn_sEOiFdxRRzlwbU2EWYU0-3AyrAep0%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaKhnvYAa-LbI9au7zSPG6YGnBshtg-MJp0z1p5pFoUavZ3h0kQOAtF7Y7LuDiitdPaw6fTIefmOVmQy7AoPYzjwva4cvL2YwRvpLMzHyAGJWo7fwTV2WgzkCb2-vtF3c8pTsuaU2AVFukH7SC6JqkxzfzOlRmre0JNMpkAYvgmtRgwwQtZASTRpZPEW8WSuKMzLtLK6aJ9V4cXYLTCVeSyk%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaHtMyEi-dS7ddSX3PhNfEsPZJdslGxkG5UT7XJMXvoDoWXOMM7DfbOanBletxo9VqZuu8ULRUraeYNOWtAPuctBTAYAOmQ5Iiikwg1qhoww0L6e7pGGZzBGOVu6LSPSiOZBvhk7PyF25Ao1yxYGZFNkHjCP-G53w8uPki7q0AGUoPVCsJhpYHjC9iiqVJncYyV26y0dqUNRUcDV1GCGqEFU%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaBkDsYQ4hO04h2ijWikEEvxxxftGtFp5zROkdQopFmoddmj4yNyiUKn0OuVHOaQMbIzEsl4BFewvqybvFpaWtanPJBnXA5R2FUvOtWJLM-v63gojFPbEO9MGYTSWM70SSBeE2cul4PHWhPUQvuTPlnu3SCNgWbZo5WRtZ2I1vSdbRmxJNn8yQAw2iHKs4DkDUeIuEu2JZHEMNcgJ3TqX0tU%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaJDIv4wLltGK1NHovKPSR3ZtJ46O2DqUvhDM2uywwWWAlINM2iICWVvqf5TXNE2kjhXG_v_xVTRj8zvAjwvEbqIN0E3phrKsosPX2f79pCdlGwad8LYEYyw7yF1j0usaSl1uVW-wn0aYqOmkKuyr6gEGzrZz8G-jOSAkh72Nld3wEgUbp0cSPk-P-FOA84f4gP90C2CvD3JsYLCHD9kStk4%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaOIyo6FQ1BWB7EOFGbzBscYgc_hHazsUwSkvLiqiVPh9w0LvXniXQjQGJt9_xUFp8dSW8Qzj9xf3O_gGpNhYYY41YhZ74QCI_pVk4KEmlsAnLS1VLjSfau2xff2d3pCQ5K54u2irU0TRUJc1e-1dqMummz7tPJYZqTqcPtnCiyxMyyaSZjuRTB3jG_4GiNRXOHz5dAYJkSP-1A7lfAapKUU%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaMX2wE8rZr40dh8kQYo1Mj2QAvhvcXSyz3d7JT3yOiesr3JbsAau8wHTniyZ0j79wqvpGxWfnm_SzuU9ACZ9n95mE_4oeHR1IUUPCAiH8WFSTltt27gGhmrn77bODgH-259CEbUAEsaMR3HEl2-KRLCu1EA800Qy_xcqLu4ZEgEVW5tGpAVuN6yhVQfHivVhdRMJFwofaFk5v1o6FfOGeDY%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_e=IuJOyKhoGJEz8zjv4RNi4ygbD04urAtpKyMgJds35UmZDzDHy_oDOjPQm75C5oDjevBJeoPREzWG86KHnbke7rNngO9mC5GVdaOLLaAqeqUeBIpCDPlmSOhg0BxAnsD9_JMmvnQVj5IgWfN6piTiEA6OvI4nKSfz0roTvd1As3LdhAaxH-MHTidnxuM_P23Bdp9do2YcXLVd0GTkD_IGRE6XRpphEQCrze1xQfSpB-1DGcqet76ipjvco5FBT7KxbW17Ul06PcFfhlSWr2HPaCFUwDAv-8uYF8hICSAvWMMUhuI9-5Sultmv8o2Fo0vq3vUAxmBYFdrxDrEDyilUwisX0kmEc1oBRoT9-WoMbmnquU1pSsvMlBxjkdpNfwclPR2dgjVcoio-L9WYm7JkU24tAsvhL6CQ77SNy-a75ZuROLroKLFyQTwx90XEr6vMabqvY4HT0XC-Qgexb3FKrXqjG2j8YspjGd8H0StxHGU%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=df2550cd92d142ddb2d9c30610904899&_t=vuydDFfLSKbj9OSVZ2LrcdQyNuzgr5sKaHHG1oKul2_beB-YSslQ82_cUQVaNvDKOeaDIX_dFLAok4Te26AYiEKDqfhs9mKYnFigk_fqRzFwpAdNET2ZPtTu6h_KrJn1Z8pkQgNFVbvF0CD5v67okFen_7nzVxCGEvAWGTIc7zg%3D).

name: BREAKING BORDER NEWS (via Team Scalise)
subject: Drop whatever you're doing! This is the most important email this year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It's official. Joe Biden just ENDED all border Wall contracts. And it gets worse -- much worse...
Drop whatever you're doing, Peter!
**It 's official. Joe Biden just ENDED all border Wall contracts. And it gets worse -- much worse...**

body:
Do you SUPPORT Democrats' efforts to save the USPS? | | | **_MSNBC ALERT: Democratic attorneys general take aim at DeJoy 's USPS service slowdowns_ **

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

Democratic attorneys general all across the country just rose up to BLOCK Republican plans to sabotage the USPS and make mail deliveries permanently slower.

But Louis DeJoy and Congressional Republicans haven't given up the fight.

And if we're going to stop these attacks for GOOD, we need to know we have the support of grassroots Democrats everywhere.**

So let us know: Do you SUPPORT Democrats' efforts to save the USPS?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)
---|---|---

We're over the moon!!

**Louis DeJoy --_Trump 's hand-picked postmaster general_ \-- thought he could get away with his schemes to make mail deliveries more expensive and PERMANENTLY slower.**

But brave Democratic attorneys general all across the country refused to accept his outrageous attacks -- _and just rose up to BLOCK his plans and SAVE the USPS!_

We're so proud to see strong Democrats taking bold steps to put an end to Louis DeJoy's schemes to sabotage the Post Office -- an essential service for MILLIONS of Americans.

**But we know he and the Republicans won 't give up easily -- and if we're going to keep up the fight in the face of their attacks, we need to know we have the support of grassroots Democrats everywhere.**

That's why we're requesting your urgent feedback straight away:
**[Do you SUPPORT Democrats' efforts to save the USPS and block Louis DeJoy's schemes?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)**
| **[YES!->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)** | ** ** | **[NO->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45774407&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMTMyOTkwNgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Big tech can't be trusted
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/09715f927d0f/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4971662?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| By now, I[’m sure you have seen the latest bombshell about Facebook and big tech’s predatory practices.](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=51eedf0d69&e=13f35c4add) Recently, a whistleblower and former employee of Facebook revealed thousands of documents that revealed not only Facebook’s knowledge of the harm they are causing, but their decision to actively ignore it. For months Facebook executives have been asked by Congress for data and information concerning the effects of its platforms on the mental health of children.
Now, we see studies by Facebook concluded its platform Instagram not only directly contributed to a decline in mental health in teenage girls but amplified their thoughts of suicide. Facebook was well aware of this shocking fact - yet they took no steps to prevent such alarming side effects. This has become the danger of big tech in our society. What started as the promise of unfettered communication for a global community, has turned into a weapon for a few to enact their agenda on the world with little consequence. Just look at how Twitter and Facebook have worked to protect democrats and ban or censor anyone who dares disagree with them - here are just a few examples:
* Twitter and Facebook consistently removed or censored posts sharing information about COVID-19, potentially resulting from a lab leak. Further investigations have now proven this may be true and gives the appearance that tech giants were covering for Communist China.

* In November 2020, Twitter blocked the posting of an article detailing damning information found on Hunter Biden’s laptop. They labeled it Russian propaganda - we now know once again this information was true and Twitter was covering for Joe Biden.

* Or how about this - Former US President Donald Trump is banned from both Twitter and Facebook, while Twitter allows the Taliban to remain active. They have quite literally chosen to allow terrorists and human rights abusers to keep their accounts while they suspend American politicians and activists.

The leaders of these Big Tech companies are hypocrites and cannot be trusted to effectively run an open platform. They clearly have a partisan agenda and hire only those who mirror that agenda. This would be bad enough, but their decision to actively ignore the harm they are causing to children is troubling. The result is a dangerous platform designed to influence, not facilitate, discourse and beliefs. These platforms have the opportunity to provide a good service to the world, and many use them positively - but we need to ensure protection and transparency are in place to prevent them from abusing power to influence, censor, and denigrate the mental health of children. This fight is far from over - but it is essential to the health of our country and the safety of our children.
---
| Sincerely,

Chris Jacobs

---
| |
---

What started as the promise of unfettered communication for a global community, has turned into a weapon for a few to enact their agenda on the world with little consequence. Just look at how Twitter and Facebook have worked to protect democrats and ban or censor anyone who dares disagree with them - here are just a few examples: Twitter and Facebook consistently removed or censored posts sharing information about COVID-19, potentially resulting from a lab leak. Further investigations have now proven this may be true and gives the appearance that tech giants were covering for Communist China. In November 2020, Twitter blocked the posting of an article detailing damning information found on Hunter Biden’s laptop. They labeled it Russian propaganda - we now know once again this information was true and Twitter was covering for Joe Biden. Or how about this - Former US President Donald Trump is banned from both Twitter and Facebook, while Twitter allows the Taliban to remain active. They have quite literally chosen to allow terrorists and human rights abusers to keep their accounts while they suspend American politicians and activists. The leaders of these Big Tech companies are hypocrites and cannot be trusted to effectively run an open platform. They clearly have a partisan agenda and hire only those who mirror that agenda. This would be bad enough, but their decision to actively ignore the harm they are causing to children is troubling. The result is a dangerous platform designed to influence, not facilitate, discourse and beliefs. These platforms have the opportunity to provide a good service to the world, and many use them positively - but we need to ensure protection and transparency are in place to prevent them from abusing power to influence, censor, and denigrate the mental health of children. This fight is far from over - but it is essential to the health of our country and the safety of our children. | Sincerely, Chris Jacobs | | | "DONATE " | | | | JACOBS FOR CONGRESS** P.O. Box 387 CLARENCE, NY 14031 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: DHS Ends Worksite Enforcement Operations to Protect “Noncitizen Victims” from Deportation
body:
In a major policy shift to help illegal immigrants in the U.S. workforce, the Biden administration is ordering the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to end mass worksite enforcement operations that often result in large-scale arrests and deportations of undocumented employees.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | October 13, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26034&F=H&)
---
# [DHS Ends Worksite Enforcement Operations to Protect “Noncitizen Victims” from Deportation](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26034&F=H&)
In a major policy shift to help illegal immigrants in the U.S. workforce, the Biden administration is ordering the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to end mass worksite enforcement operations that often result in large-scale arrests and deportations of undocumented employees. The administration is also directing agencies that operate under DHS, which was created after 9/11 to counter terrorism, secure borders and uphold the nation’s economic security, to protect foreigners working in the country illegally by shielding them from removal proceedings when they get caught.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26034&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Targeting Trump: Durham Uncovers New Clinton, FBI Connections in Russia Probe ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26035&F=H&) Judicial Watch The wheels of justice grind slow—much to the exasperation of, well, everybody. In April 2019, Attorney General William Barr appointed federal prosecutor John Durham to get to the bottom of the Russia mess: the sensational allegations, both before and after Donald Trump’s November 2016 presidential election victory, of Trump connections to dirty Russian money, dirty players, and dirty deeds. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26035&F=H&)
---
### [Judicial Watch Obtains CRT Teacher Training Guide For Westerly, Rhode Island ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26036&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanctY3J0LXRyYWluaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEzMjM1NDM5) Legal Insurrection We don’t teach Critical Race Theory! But how dare you try to stop us from teaching what we don’t teach!

That’s pretty much the argument you will find at almost all school districts. As explained a gazillion times, you will not find a third-grade book called Critical Race Theory. Instead, you find the race-focused principles of CRT under other names, such as “antiracism,” “equity,” and “culturally responsive learning.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26036&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanctY3J0LXRyYWluaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDEzMjM1NDM5)

### [FARRELL: Concerned Parents Are Not National Security Threats ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1kYy1jb25jZXJuZWQtcGFyZW50cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAxMzIzNTQzOQ==) The Daily Caller On Monday the Justice Department announced that Attorney General Garland directed the FBI and U.S. Attorneys’ Offices to conduct meetings with federal, state, tribal, territorial and local law enforcement leaders to discuss strategies for addressing an alleged “increase in harassment, intimidation and threats of violence against school board members, teachers and workers in our nation’s public schools.” The DOJ also noted “additional efforts” would be pursued, including a broad-based task force (including the National Security Division) that is being formed to “determine how federal enforcement tools can be used to prosecute these crimes,” or to assist local law enforcement “where threats of violence may not constitute federal crimes.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56853&L=26017&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1kYy1jb25jZXJuZWQtcGFyZW50cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAxMzIzNTQzOQ==)

clean_body: In a major policy shift to help illegal immigrants in the U.S. workforce, the Biden administration is ordering the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to end mass worksite enforcement operations that often result in large-scale arrests and deportations of undocumented employees. | | | Because no one is above the law! | October 13, 2021 ---|---|--- | | == == In a major policy shift to help illegal immigrants in the U.S. workforce, the Biden administration is ordering the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to end mass worksite enforcement operations that often result in large-scale arrests and deportations of undocumented employees. The administration is also directing agencies that operate under DHS, which was created after 9/11 to counter terrorism, secure borders and uphold the nation’s economic security, to protect foreigners working in the country illegally by shielding them from removal proceedings when they get caught. == | | | = Judicial Watch The wheels of justice grind slow—much to the exasperation of, well, everybody. In April 2019, Attorney General William Barr appointed federal prosecutor John Durham to get to the bottom of the Russia mess: the sensational allegations, both before and after Donald Trump’s November 2016 presidential election victory, of Trump connections to dirty Russian money, dirty players, and dirty deeds. = Legal Insurrection We don’t teach Critical Race Theory! But how dare you try to stop us from teaching what we don’t teach! That’s pretty much the argument you will find at almost all school districts. As explained a gazillion times, you will not find a third-grade book called Critical Race Theory. Instead, you find the race-focused principles of CRT under other names, such as “antiracism,” “equity,” and “culturally responsive learning.” == The Daily Caller On Monday the Justice Department announced that Attorney General Garland directed the FBI and U.S. Attorneys’ Offices to conduct meetings with federal, state, tribal, territorial and local law enforcement leaders to discuss strategies for addressing an alleged “increase in harassment, intimidation and threats of violence against school board members, teachers and workers in our nation’s public schools.” The DOJ also noted “additional efforts” would be pursued, including a broad-based task force (including the National Security Division) that is being formed to “determine how federal enforcement tools can be used to prosecute these crimes,” or to assist local law enforcement “where threats of violence may not constitute federal crimes.” == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |
